а§™а§Ха•На§Ја§Ња§®а•На§§а§Њ а§Йа§™а§µа§Єа•На§§а§µа•На§ѓа§Ња§Г, а§™а§Ха•На§Ја§Ња§¶а§ѓа•Л а§ља§≠а§ња§ѓа§Ја•На§Яа§µа•На§ѓа§Ња§Га•§ а§Ха§ња§Юа•На§Ъ - ‘а§Еа§•а§Ња§™а§∞а§Ња§єа•На§£ а§Па§µа§Ња§™а•На§≤а•Ба§§а•На§ѓа•Ма§™а§µа§Єа§•а§ња§Ха§В а§¶а§Ѓа•На§™а§§а•А а§≠а•Ба§Юа•На§Ьа•Аа§ѓа§Ња§§а§Ња§В а§ѓа§¶а•Н а§Па§®а§ѓа•Ла§Г а§Ха§Ња§Ѓа•На§ѓа§В а§Єа•На§ѓа§Ња§§а•Н- а§Єа§∞а•На§™а§ња§∞а•Н а§Ѓа§ња§ґа•На§∞а§В а§Єа•На§ѓа§Ња§§а•Н а§Ха•Ба§ґа§≤а•За§®’а•§

‘а§Еа§ђа§єа•Ба§µа§Ња§¶а•А а§Єа•На§ѓа§Ња§§а•На•§ а§Єа§§а•На§ѓа§В а§µа§ња§µа§¶а§ња§Ја•За§§а•На•§ а§Еа§І а§Па§µа•Иа§§а§Ња§В а§∞а§Ња§§а•На§∞а§ња§В а§ґа§ѓа•Аа§ѓа§Ња§§а§Ња§Ѓа•На•§ а§§а•М а§Ца§≤а•Б а§Ьа§Ња§Ча•На§∞а§®а•Н-а§Ѓа§ња§ґа•На§∞а§Ња§µа•Н а§Па§µа•Иа§§а§Ња§В а§∞а§Ња§§а•На§∞а§ња§В а§µа§ња§єа§∞а•За§ѓа§Ња§§а§Ња§Ѓа•Н а§За§§а§ња§єа§Ња§Є-а§Ѓа§ња§ґа•На§∞а•За§£ а§µа§Њ а§Ха•За§®а§Ъа§ња§¶а•Н а§µа§Ња•§ а§Ьа•Ба§Ча•Ба§™а•На§Єа•За§ѓа§Ња§§а§Ња§В а§§а•На§µа•Н а§Па§µа§Ња§µа•На§∞а§§а•На§ѓа•За§≠а•На§ѓа§Г а§Ха§∞а•На§Ѓа§≠а•На§ѓа§Га•§’

а§™а§∞а•За§¶а•На§ѓа•Ба§∞а•Н а§єа•Ла§Ѓа§Ња§ѓ а§Єа§Ѓа•На§≠а§Ња§∞а§Єа§Ѓа•На§≠а§∞а§£а§Ња§¶а§ѓа•Л а§µа•На§ѓа§µа§Єа•На§•а§Ња§Г а§Ха§Ња§∞а•На§ѓа§Ња§Га•§

а§™а•На§∞а§Ња§ѓа§ґа•На§Ъа§ња§§а•На§§а§Ња§∞а•На§•а§Ѓа•Н а§Еа§™а§њ а§Ха§ња§Юа•На§Ъа§®а•Н а§µа•На§∞а§§а§Ѓа•Н

“а§™а§∞а•На§µа§£а§њ а§µа§Њ а§§а§ња§≤а§≠а§Ха•На§Ј а§Йа§™а•Ла§Ја•На§ѓ а§µа§Њ а§ґа•На§µа•Ла§≠а•Ва§§ а§Йа§¶а§Ха§Ѓа•Ба§™а§Єа•На§™а•Га§ґа•На§ѓ а§Єа§Ња§µа§ња§§а•На§∞а•Аа§В а§™а•На§∞а§Ња§£а§Ња§ѓа§Ња§Ѓа§ґа§Г а§Єа§єа§Єа•На§∞а§Ха•Га§§а•На§µ а§Жа§µа§∞а•На§§а§ѓа•За§¶а•Н а§Еа§™а•На§∞а§Ња§£а§Ња§ѓа§Ња§Ѓа§ґа•Л а§µа§Њ” а§За§§а•На§ѓа•Н а§Жа§™а§Єа•На§§а§Ѓа•На§ђа§Іа§∞а•На§Ѓа§Єа•Ва§§а•На§∞а•За§Ја•Ба•§

а§™а§Юа•На§Ъ-а§™а§∞а•На§µ-а§™а•Ва§Ьа§Њ (а§Еа§Ѓа§Ња§µа§Ња§Єа•На§ѓа§Њ)

Observed on AmƒБvƒБsyƒБ tithi of every (lunar) month (ƒА≈ЫvinaбЄ•/paraviddha).

Details
  • Edit config file
  • Tags: Pancha Parva
а§™а§ња§£а•На§°-а§™а§ња§§а•Г-а§ѓа§Ьа•На§Юа§Г

Pinda Pitru Yajnam is a ≈ЫrƒБddham to be done to two sets of Pitru Devatas. It is to be done in one’s Agnihotra Agni or if that is not present then Aupasana Agni. Rice is cooked in a section of the Agni moved to the south-east. From this, even those whose father is living, give ƒБhuti to the Deva Pitru-s ie s≈Нma, yama and agni kavyavƒБhana. Those whose father is not living should additionally give piбєЗбЄНas to the Manushya Pitru-s also to whom amƒБvƒБsyƒБ-≈ЫrƒБddham is also performed.

Details
  • Edit config file
  • Tags: ShraddhaDays
а§Єа§∞а•На§µ-а§Ха§Ња§∞а•На§§а•На§§а§ња§Х-а§Еа§Ѓа§Ња§µа§Ња§Єа•На§ѓа§Њ (а§Еа§≤а§≠а•На§ѓа§Ѓа•НвАУа§µа§ња§ґа§Ња§Ца§Њ)

amƒБvƒБsyƒБ of kƒБrttika month.

Details
  • Edit config file
  • Tags: AmavasyaDays

It is said in Vishnupuranam that when Amavasya overlaps with one of nine nakshatras—Anuradha, Vishakha, Swati, Pushya, Ardra, Punarvasu, Shravishtha, Purvaproshthapada, or Shatabhishak—it is sacred even for Devas. For instance, Shraaddha done on an Amavasya joined with Anuradha, Vishakha, Swati keeps the pitrs satisfied for eight years. Likewise, on Pushya, Ardra and Punarvasu, the pitrs satisfied for twelve years.

а§¶а•На§µа§Ња§¶а§ґа§Ња§ђа•На§¶а§В а§§а§¶а§Њ а§§а•Га§™а•На§§а§ња§В а§™а•На§∞а§ѓа§Ња§®а•На§§а§њ а§™а§ња§§а§∞а•Ла§ља§∞а•На§Ъа§ња§§а§Ња§Га••
а§µа§Ња§Єа§µа§Ња§Ьа•Иа§Ха§™а§Ња§¶а•Га§Ха•На§Ја•З а§™а§ња§§а•Да§£а§Ња§В а§§а•Га§™а•На§§а§ња§Ѓа§ња§Ъа•На§Ыа§§а§Ња§Ѓа•На•§
а§µа§Ња§∞а•Ба§£а•З а§Ъа§Ња§™а•На§ѓа§Ѓа§Ња§µа§Ња§Єа•На§ѓа§Њ а§¶а•За§µа§Ња§®а§Ња§Ѓа§™а§њ а§¶а•Ба§∞а•На§≤а§≠а§Ња•§
а§®а§µа§Єа•На§µа•Га§Ха•На§Ја•За§Ја•На§µа§Ѓа§Ња§µа§Ња§Єа•На§ѓа§Њ а§ѓа§¶а•Иа§§а•За§Ја•На§µа§µа§®а•Аа§™а§§а•За••

  • References

  • Edit config file
  • Tags: AmavasyaDays
а§ґа§ња§µа§∞а§Ња§Ьа§Г а§Єа§™а•На§§а§Ха•Ла§Яа•За§ґа•На§µа§∞-а§Ѓа§®а•На§¶а§ња§∞а§®а§ња§∞а•На§Ѓа§Ња§£а§Ѓа•Н а§Жа§∞а§≠а§§а•З #а•©а•Ђа•Ђ

Event occured on 1667-11-23 (gregorian). Julian date was converted to Gregorian in this reckoning.

On 13th November 1668 (in the same month as the raid on bArdesh, Goa), Shivaji commenced the construction of the temple of Shri Saptakoteshvara at Narwe.

Formerly the temple of Shri Saptakoteshvara, the family deity of the Kadamba dynasty that ruled over Goa in the 12th century, was in the village named Narwe (Naroa) in Divadi, a tiny coastal island. It was destroyed by the Muslims and the stone image of the deity was hidden by the devotees in the embankment of a field.

When Goa came under the sway of Vijayanagar, Madhava, a minister of that Empire, built a new magnificent temple at the same place and reestablished the deity. This, too, was destroyed in 1540 вАУ this time by the Portuguese - along with many other temples. They built a chapel dedicated to Nossa Senhora Candelaria in its place.

Some remains of the ancient temple could still be noticed in the chapel. The image of the deity was smuggled out of Goa and a temple was built in another village within Adilshahi territory also named Narwe (Naroa) in the district of Dicholi, opposite the one in Divadi. This temple, it seems, was in a very dilapidated condition.

Shivaji was now building a new one at that site which he perhaps intended would serve as a beacon of hope for his Hindu brethren in Goa. This was all that he could do for them at the moment.

Details

  • Tags:
а§§а§ња§∞а•Ба§µа§ња§ґа§≤а•Ва§∞а•Н а§Ча§Ща•На§Ча§Ња§Ха§∞а•На§Ја§£-а§Ѓа§єа•Ла§§а•На§Єа§µ-а§Єа§Ѓа§Ња§™а§®а§Ѓа•Н

Observed on AmƒБvƒБsyƒБ tithi of KƒБrttikaбЄ• (lunar) month (AparƒБhбєЗaбЄ•/puurvaviddha).

Thiruvisanallur Sridhara Aiyyaval brought Ganga to his house well on this day! See also http://www.sriayyaval.org/ .

а§¶а§∞а•На§ґа•За§Ја•На§Яа§ња§Г

Observed on ≈Ъukla-PrathamƒБ tithi of every (lunar) month (P≈ЂrvƒБhбєЗaбЄ•/puurvaviddha).

Details
  • Edit config file
  • Tags: MonthlyFestivals
а§°а§Ња§∞а•На§µа§ња§®-а§µа§ња§Ха§Ња§Є-а§µа§Ња§¶-а§Ча•На§∞а§®а•На§•-а§™а•На§∞а§Ха§Ња§ґа§®а§Ѓа•Н #а•Іа•ђа•©

Event occured on 1859-11-24 (gregorian).

Charles Darwin’s ‘On the origin of species’ (On the Origin of Species by Means of Natural Selection, or the Preservation of Favoured Races in the Struggle for Life) was published in England to great acclaim.

Details
  • Edit config file
  • Tags:
а§Ха§Ња§Юа•На§Ъа•А а•Іа•Ѓ а§Ьа§Ча§¶а•На§Ча•Ба§∞а•Б а§ґа•На§∞а•А-а§ѓа•Ла§Ча§§а§ња§≤а§Х а§Єа•Ба§∞а•За§®а•На§¶а•На§∞ а§Єа§∞а§Єа•На§µа§§а•А а§Жа§∞а§Ња§Іа§®а§Њ #а•Іа•ђа•©а•Ѓ

Observed on ≈Ъukla-PrathamƒБ tithi of MƒБrga≈ЫƒЂrбє£aбЄ• (lunar) month (AparƒБhбєЗaбЄ•/vyaapti). The event occurred in 3486 (Kali era).

The austere preceptor Surendra after defeating boldly in debate the materialist Durdhivi and his companion JƒЂva, being honoured by King Surendra in his Court merged in his original state. Preceptor Surendra, a Maharashtrian, revered by all as MƒБthura, resorted to asceticism, an adept in Yogic practices, governed the Maбє≠ha for only ten years and reached his abode on the first day of the bright fortnight in the month of MƒБrga≈ЫƒЂrбє£a of the TƒБraбєЗa year in the Kali era 3486.

Observed on ≈Ъukla-PrathamƒБ tithi of every (lunar) month (P≈ЂrvƒБhбєЗaбЄ•/puurvaviddha).

‘а§™а§∞а•На§µа§£а§њ а§µа§Њ а§§а§ња§≤а§≠а§Ха•На§Ј а§Йа§™а•Ла§Ја•На§ѓ а§µа§Њ а§ґа•На§µа•Ла§≠а•Ва§§ а§Йа§¶а§Ха§Ѓа•Ба§™а§Єа•На§™а•Га§ґа•На§ѓ а§Єа§Ња§µа§ња§§а•На§∞а•Аа§В а§™а•На§∞а§Ња§£а§Ња§ѓа§Ња§Ѓа§ґа§Г а§Єа§єа§Єа•На§∞а§Ха•Га§§а•На§µ а§Жа§µа§∞а•На§§а§ѓа•За§¶а•Н а§Еа§™а•На§∞а§Ња§£а§Ња§ѓа§Ња§Ѓа§ґа•Л а§µа§Њ ' а§За§§а•На§ѓа•Н а§Жа§™а§Єа•На§§а§Ѓа•На§ђа§Іа§∞а•На§Ѓа§Єа•Ва§§а•На§∞а•За§Ја•Ба•§

  • Edit config file
  • Tags: MonthlyFestivals
а§∞а§Ша•Ба§®а§Ња§•а§Ѓа§®а•На§¶а§ња§∞а§Ња§Ха•На§∞а§Ѓа§£а§Ѓа•Н а•®а•¶а•¶а•®а•Іа•І #а•®а•¶

Event occured on 2002-11-24 (gregorian).

Two suicide bombers attacked the rAma temple in Jammu (dating to 1860), just a few months after the March attack. They killed fourteen devotees and injured 45 others. CRPF men Yatindra Nath Rai, Assistant Commandant, Dev Singh, Head Constable, E.G. Rao, Head Constable, T.A.Singh, Constable, and Late K.K. Pandey showed great gallantry.

Details
  • Edit config file
  • Tags:
а§¶а§∞а•На§ґ-а§Єа•На§•а§Ња§≤а•Аа§™а§Ња§Ха§Г

Observed on ≈Ъukla-PrathamƒБ tithi of every (lunar) month (P≈ЂrvƒБhбєЗaбЄ•/puurvaviddha). sthƒБlƒЂpakaбЄ• is an important fortnightly ritual, involving the offering of haviбє£yƒБnna to agni, with the offering being cooked on the fire itself.

  • Edit config file
  • Tags: MonthlyFestivals
а§µа§®а§¶а•Ба§∞а•На§Ча§Ња§®а§µа§∞а§Ња§§а•На§∞-а§Жа§∞а§Ѓа•На§≠а§Г

Observed on ≈Ъukla-PrathamƒБ tithi of MƒБrga≈ЫƒЂrбє£aбЄ• (lunar) month (S≈Ђry≈НdayaбЄ•/puurvaviddha).

Vanadurga Navaratri. Specially celebrated in Karthiramangalam.

Have darshan of Moon today, chanting the following shloka

а§ґа•На§µа•За§§а§Ња§Ѓа•На§ђа§∞а§Г а§ґа•На§µа•За§§а§µа§ња§≠а•Ва§Ја§£а§ґа•На§Ъ
а§ґа•На§µа•За§§а§¶а•На§ѓа•Ба§§а§ња§∞а•На§¶а§£а•На§°а§Іа§∞а•Л а§¶а•На§µа§ња§ђа§Ња§єа•Ба§Га•§
а§Ъа§®а•На§¶а•На§∞а•Ла§ља§Ѓа•Га§§а§Ња§§а•На§Ѓа§Њ а§µа§∞а§¶а§Г а§Ха§ња§∞а•Аа§Яа•А
а§Ѓа§ѓа§њ а§™а•На§∞а§Єа§Ња§¶а§В а§µа§ња§¶а§Іа§Ња§§а•Б а§¶а•За§µа§Га••

Details
  • Edit config file
  • Tags: ChandraDarshanam
а§Ѓа•Аа§∞а§™а•Ба§∞а•З а§єа§ња§®а•На§¶а•Ба§Ха§єа§§а•На§ѓа§Њ #а•≠а•Ђ

Event occured on 1947-11-25 (gregorian).

On this day, began the large scale massacre of over 20k Hindu and sikhs at mIrpur in pAkistAn occupied kAshmIr.

In the morning, jihAdi-s entered mIrpur city. Rioting began. Of the minority population, only about 2,500 Hindus or Sikhs escaped through the border to Jammu and Kashmir along with the State troops. The jihAdi-s killed every hindu and sikh - shooting, hacking, even slitting throats while chanting kAlima-s (eg. at the gurdwara at Ali Baig which had been turned into a prison camp). Around 5k women were raped and abducted - though many committed mass suicide to escape that fate.

Aftermath

In March 1948, the ICRC rescued 1,600 of the survivors from Ali Baig. By 1951, only 790 non-Muslims remained in areas that came to comprise Azad Kashmir; down from a previous population of 114,000 which used to live there. Governments of sheikh abdullah and successors did not give them resident status.

  • Tags:

а§Йа§§а•На§Єа§µа§Ња§Г

  • а§Уа§Ѓа•На§ђа•На§≤-а§§а•Ба§Ха§Ња§∞а§Ња§Ѓ-а§µа•Аа§∞а§Ча§§а§ња§Г #а•Іа•™, а§Ѓа•Ва§∞а•На§Ха•На§Ц а§®а§Ња§ѓа§©а§Ња§∞а•Н (а•©а•І) а§Ча•Ба§∞а•Ба§™а•Ва§Ьа•И, а§Єа§Ња§ѓа§®-а§µа•На§ѓа§§а•Аа§™а§Ња§§а§Г
а§Ѓа•Ва§∞а•На§Ха•На§Ц а§®а§Ња§ѓа§©а§Ња§∞а•Н (а•©а•І) а§Ча•Ба§∞а•Ба§™а•Ва§Ьа•И

Observed on M≈ЂlƒБ nakshatra of Vrћ•≈ЫcikaбЄ• (sidereal solar) month (PrƒБtaбЄ•/paraviddha).

Details
  • Edit config file
  • Tags: NayanarGurupujai
а§Уа§Ѓа•На§ђа•На§≤-а§§а•Ба§Ха§Ња§∞а§Ња§Ѓ-а§µа•Аа§∞а§Ча§§а§ња§Г #а•Іа•™

Event occured on 2008-11-26 (gregorian).

tukArAm Omble died stopping jihAdi terrorist Ajmal Kasab in Mumbai on this day.

Background and events

Omble joined the police as a constable in 1991 after retiring from the Indian Army’s Signal Corps as a naik. He was an ASI with the Mumbai Police. On 26/11 he and his team were guarding one of the checkposts when they were approached by two terrorists in a hijacked car. After an initial shootout, one of the terrorists died inside the car, while the other, Ajmal Kasab got out of the car and lay down to pretend surrender. As unarmed Omble approached him, Kasab got up and tried to open fire. Omble stood in front of him and held on to the barrel of Kasab’s rifle, thus preventing the bullets from hitting anyone else but him. The rest of the team managed to overpower and apprehend Kasab. Omble had taken over 40 bullets from an Ak-47 at point blank range and did not survive.

####### Other heroes of the day

  • Mukesh Jadhav : A 23 year old Home Guard earning mere вВє90 per day. He was posted at CST. When Kasab & gang came he guided many passengers to safety. In saving one passenger he face to face with one terrorist & lost his life.
  • Jillu Yadav - He was a constable of RPF & he took Kasab & Ismail Khan head on. He was armed with outdated .303 rifle & terrorists had 3 AK47 & grenades. He fought bravely & even threw chairs when his rifle jammed to not allow terrorist to cross over to other platform.
  • Vishnu Zende - He was announcer at CST when carnage started. He was fired upon but he kept announcing & informed passenger about terrorist presence. Due to his announcements many lives were saved.
  • Vijay Surve - He is a Shivsainik & when 26/11 started he along with few of his Shiv Sena workers shifted people around Nariman House to safer locations.
  • Captain Tamil Selvan - He was parcel contractor & suddenly when injured people came at his counter he realised that there was attack at CST. He & his two staff members evacuated many & saved lives of 36 injured.
  • Vijay Khandekar - He was wireless operator & he was on leave when event occurred. He immediately proceeded to Cama Hospital & he was martyred when grenade was thrown at police party.
  • Inspector Sanjay Govilkar - He was part of the police team that captured Ajmal Kasab alive. When he realised on scene that Kasab has attacked Omble he used his lathi to disarm Kasab.
  • Sub-Inspector Bhaskar Kadam - He was the one to intercept Skoda of terrorist & he neutralised Ismail Khan with six shots fired from his gun.
  • Inspector Deepak Dhole - He managed to keep the terrorists at Taj Hotel confined to top floor for four hours & he responded whenever they tried to flee to other location. He suffered burn injuries. He never got any reward or promotion despite promise from then HM RR Patil.
  • Inspector Nagappa Mahale - He was the one who coordinated the operation at Chowpatty which led to arrest of Kasab yet he never received any commendation or reward.
  • Inspector Kishor Shinde - When a bag full of RDX was found at Oberoi Trident he quickly took it & placed it at an isolated place. It exploded few minutes later. If not for him many lives would have been lost that day.
  • Captain Amitendra Singh - This 25 year old braveheart from NSG suffered serious injuries to his eyes during raid at Oberoi Hotel. He lost his left eye permanently & returned to duty on a desk job. He was awarded with Shaurya Chakra.
  • Sub-Inspector Sudam Pandarkar - He was in ladies compartment for duty when he heard gunshots. He fired 3 shots from his .303 rifle & in return fire from terrorists he was wounded in the chest.
  • Commando Sunil Yadav - NSG brave-heart was trying to rescue people stuck at Taj Hotel when a bullet passed through his both legs. Somehow he got up & rescued guest who were stuck at 4th floor.
  • Dr Ashish Tiwari - He was physician at Bombay hospital. He drove to hospital as soon as he got report of attacks. He & his team set up various operation units at war footing. They saved many lives with their quick response.
Details

  • Tags:

а§Ча•Ла§µа§Ња§ѓа§Ња§В а§ђа§®а•На§Іа•Аа§®а§Ња§Ѓа•Н а§™а•На§∞а•За§§а•Аа§Ха§∞а§£а§Ѓа•Н #а•®а•ѓа•І

Event occured on 1731-11-27 (gregorian). Julian date was converted to Gregorian in this reckoning.

On this day (1731, Nov 16 Julian), the Portuguese King gave the final order that, ‘I permit you to Baptise the (captive) women and children. Go ahead.’ chimAjI appa would soon put an end to this.

Background

1731, Mar 20: Portuguese Viceroy informed the King of Portugal: ‘During our war with Marathas, we captured many women & children & we’re going to Baptise them.’

1715: An order was passed:- ‘Hindus shall be compelled to listen Christian doctrine.’ This law led to mass exodus of Hindus from the city of Goa.

а§Йа§§а•На§Єа§µа§Ња§Г

  • а§Ха§Ња§Юа•На§Ъа•А а•©а•® а§Ьа§Ча§¶а•На§Ча•Ба§∞а•Б а§ґа•На§∞а•А-а§Ъа§ња§¶а§Ња§®а§®а•На§¶а§Ша§®а•За§®а•На§¶а•На§∞ а§Єа§∞а§Єа•На§µа§§а•А а§Жа§∞а§Ња§Іа§®а§Њ #а•Іа•©а•Ђа•І, а§ґа•На§∞а§µа§£-а§µа•На§∞а§§а§Ѓа•Н, а§Єа•Ла§Ѓа§ґа•На§∞а§Ња§µа§£а•А-а§ѓа•Ла§Ча§Г
а§Ха§Ња§Юа•На§Ъа•А а•©а•® а§Ьа§Ча§¶а•На§Ча•Ба§∞а•Б а§ґа•На§∞а•А-а§Ъа§ња§¶а§Ња§®а§®а•На§¶а§Ша§®а•За§®а•На§¶а•На§∞ а§Єа§∞а§Єа•На§µа§§а•А а§Жа§∞а§Ња§Іа§®а§Њ #а•Іа•©а•Ђа•І

Observed on ≈Ъukla-бєҐaбє£бє≠hƒЂ tithi of MƒБrga≈ЫƒЂrбє£aбЄ• (lunar) month (AparƒБhбєЗaбЄ•/vyaapti). The event occurred in 3773 (Kali era).

Son of KaбєЗбєЗ≈Ђ≈ЫaбєЕkara, the clever PadmanƒБbha by ame, though intent on practising Lambika Yoga, this preceptor CidƒБnandaghanendra adhering to the injunctions of the Master, remained in the seat of KƒБmakoбє≠i that bestows all desired things to those who resort to, fed innumerable devotees every day. He, the adept in Yoga reinstating compassionately the Kannada prince who lost kith and kin in his own kingdom through his (the princeвАЩs) conqueror, He (CidƒБnandaghanendra) remained as preceptor only for four years sustaining on dry leaves. This preceptor reached his Ultimate abode which is devoid of all grief, delusion etc. on the sixty day of bright fortnight in the month of MƒБrga≈ЫƒЂrбє£a of the year Prajotpati.

а§™а§¶а§Ѓа§®а•Б а§Ъа§§а•Ба§∞а•Ла§ља§ђа•На§¶а§Ња§®а•За§µ а§¶а•За§µа•Ла§ља§Іа•На§ѓа§µа§Ња§§а•На§Єа•Аа§§а•На••а•ђа•®а••
а§™а•На§∞а§Ьа•Ла§§а•На§™а§§а•На§§а•М а§Ѓа§Ња§∞а•На§Ча§ґа•Аа§∞а•На§Ја•З а§Єа§ња§§а§Ја§Ја•На§†а•На§ѓа§Ња§Ѓа•Н а§Еа§Ча§Ња§¶а•Н а§Еа§Єа•Ма•§
а§™а§¶а§В а§Єа•На§µа§В а§™а§∞а§Ѓа§В а§Єа§∞а•На§µа§ґа•Ла§Ха§Ѓа•Ла§єа§µа§ња§µа§∞а•На§Ьа§ња§§а§Ѓа•На••а•ђа•©а••
вАФа§™а•Ба§£а•На§ѓа§ґа•На§≤а•Ла§Ха§Ѓа§Юа•На§Ьа§∞а•А

Details
  • References
    • Punya Shloka Manjari
  • Edit config file
  • Tags: KanchiAradhanaDays
а§Єа•Ла§Ѓа§ґа•На§∞а§Ња§µа§£а•А-а§ѓа•Ла§Ча§Г
  • 10:26вЖТ

When Shravana nakshatra falls on a Monday, it is a special y≈НgaбЄ•. When Rohini nakshatra falls on a Saturday, it is a special y≈НgaбЄ•. In the cyclic rotation of time, along with the bad combinations of grahas and nakshatras that indicate the probability of upcoming difficulties, good combinations that grant benefits in multiples also arise. Among such good combinations are the Amrita Siddhi yogas of certain weekdays and nakshatras. They are Sunday-Hasta, Monday-Mrigashirsha, Tuesday-Ashvini, Wednesday-Anuradha, Thursday-Pushya, Friday-Revati, Saturday-Rohini. Good deeds performed on such yogas become especially strong in protecting and nourishing us. For instance, in Devi Atharvashirsha, it is said bhaumƒБ≈ЫvinyƒБбєБ mahƒБdevƒЂ-sannidhau japtvƒБ mahƒБmrћ•tyuбєБ tarati, that is, one can cross even mahƒБmrћ•tyu by doing parayanam when Tuesday and Ashvini join.

а§Жа§¶а§ња§§а•На§ѓа§єа§Єа•На§§а•З а§Ча•Ба§∞а•Ба§™а•Ба§Ја•На§ѓа§ѓа•Ла§Ча•З а§ђа•Ба§Іа§Ња§®а•Ба§∞а§Ња§Іа§Њ а§ґа§®а§ња§∞а•Ла§єа§ња§£а•А а§Ъа•§
а§Єа•Ла§Ѓа•З а§Ъ а§Єа•Ма§Ѓа•На§ѓа§В а§≠а•Га§Ча•Ба§∞а•За§µа§§а•А а§Ъ а§≠а•Ма§Ѓа§Ња§ґа•На§µа§ња§®а•А а§Ъа§Ња§Ѓа•Га§§а§Єа§ња§¶а•На§Іа§ња§ѓа•Ла§Ча§Ња§Га••

а§Йа§§а•На§Єа§µа§Ња§Г

  • а§Ха§Ња§Юа•На§Ъа•А а•Ђ а§Ьа§Ча§¶а•На§Ча•Ба§∞а•Б а§ґа•На§∞а•А-а§Ьа•На§Юа§Ња§®а§Ња§®а§®а•На§¶а•За§®а•На§¶а•На§∞ а§Єа§∞а§Єа•На§µа§§а•А а§Жа§∞а§Ња§Іа§®а§Њ #а•®а•®а•®а•≠, а§®а§®а•На§¶а§Њ-а§Єа§™а•На§§а§Ѓа•А, а§Ѓа§Ња§∞а•На§Ча§ґа•Аа§∞а•На§Ј-а§ґа§ња§µа§≤а§ња§Ща•На§Ч-а§Ја§Ја•На§†а•А, а§Ѓа§ња§§а•На§∞-а§Єа§™а•На§§а§Ѓа•А, а§ґа§ња§µа§∞а§Ња§Ьа•Л а§ђа§Ња§∞а§Ња§¶а•За§ґа§В а§≤а•Ба§£а•На§†а§§а§њ #а•©а•Ђа•Ђ, а§Єа•Ба§ђа•На§∞а§єа•На§Ѓа§£а•На§ѓ-а§Ја§Ја•На§†а•А-а§µа•На§∞а§§а§Ѓа•Н
а§Ха§Ња§Юа•На§Ъа•А а•Ђ а§Ьа§Ча§¶а•На§Ча•Ба§∞а•Б а§ґа•На§∞а•А-а§Ьа•На§Юа§Ња§®а§Ња§®а§®а•На§¶а•За§®а•На§¶а•На§∞ а§Єа§∞а§Єа•На§µа§§а•А а§Жа§∞а§Ња§Іа§®а§Њ #а•®а•®а•®а•≠

Observed on ≈Ъukla-SaptamƒЂ tithi of MƒБrga≈ЫƒЂrбє£aбЄ• (lunar) month (AparƒБhбєЗaбЄ•/vyaapti). The event occurred in 2897 (Kali era).

Born of a brahmin called NƒБge≈Ыa in the village called MaбєЕgala of the Chola country, the erudite saint well-known as ≈ЪrƒЂ J√±ƒБnottama, foremost among logicians, having adorned the PƒЂбє≠ha of preceptors for sixty-three years, attained salvation/siddhi on the seventh day of the bright fortnight in the month of MƒБrga≈ЫƒЂrбє£a of the year Manmatha.

а§Ьа§Ња§§а•Л а§Ѓа§Ща•На§Ча§≤а§®а§Ња§Ѓа•На§®а§њ а§Ъа•Ла§≤а§µа§ња§Ја§ѓа•З а§®а§Ња§Ча•За§ґа§Єа§Ва§Ьа•На§Юа§Ња§¶а•Н а§¶а•На§µа§ња§Ьа§Њ-

а§Ѓа§Ња§∞а•На§Ча§ґа•Аа§∞а•На§Ј-а§ґа§ња§µа§≤а§ња§Ща•На§Ч-а§Ја§Ја•На§†а•А

Observed on ≈Ъukla-бєҐaбє£бє≠hƒЂ tithi of MƒБrga≈ЫƒЂrбє£aбЄ• (lunar) month (S≈Ђry≈НdayaбЄ•/puurvaviddha).

Have darshan of Shivalingam today; removes Shivapachara doshas in the family.

а§Ѓа§ња§§а•На§∞-а§Єа§™а•На§§а§Ѓа•А

Observed on ≈Ъukla-SaptamƒЂ tithi of MƒБrga≈ЫƒЂrбє£aбЄ• (lunar) month (AparƒБhбєЗaбЄ•/puurvaviddha).

Birth of Surya to Aditya-Kashyapa on this day.

а§Еа§¶а§ња§§а•На§ѓа§Ња§В а§Ха§ґа•На§ѓа§™а§Ња§Ьа•На§Ьа§Ьа•На§Юа•З а§Ѓа§ња§§а•На§∞а•Л а§®а§Ња§Ѓ а§¶а§ња§µа§Ња§Ха§∞а§Га•§

а§®а§®а•На§¶а§Њ-а§Єа§™а•На§§а§Ѓа•А

Observed on ≈Ъukla-SaptamƒЂ tithi of MƒБrga≈ЫƒЂrбє£aбЄ• (lunar) month (MadhyƒБhnaбЄ•/puurvaviddha).

Details
  • References
    • Bhavishyottara Puranam
  • Edit config file
  • Tags: SpecialVratam LessCommonFestivals
а§ґа§ња§µа§∞а§Ња§Ьа•Л а§ђа§Ња§∞а§Ња§¶а•За§ґа§В а§≤а•Ба§£а•На§†а§§а§њ #а•©а•Ђа•Ђ

Event occured on 1667-11-29 (gregorian). Julian date was converted to Gregorian in this reckoning.

shivAjI invaded bArdesh with 5k foot and 1k horse, plundered and withdrew after 3 days. 2 Portuguese priests were killed. An English account from 10 days later says that the cause was irritation at roman catholic fanaticism (which was then rescinded by the Portuguese viceroy) - but this is not mentioned in Portuguese or Dutch letters and the later agreement, which say that the objective was to capture the desai-s from there who were using it as a base for their looting operations with Portuguese support.

Details
  • Edit config file
  • Tags:

Also known as champƒБ/champaka бє£aбє£бє≠hƒЂ

а§Йа§§а•На§Єа§µа§Ња§Г

  • а§≤а§Ња§Я-а§Ѓа§®а•На§¶а§ња§∞-а§™а•Ба§®а§∞а•Н-а§®а§Ња§ґа§Г #а•©а•Ђа•≠
а§≤а§Ња§Я-а§Ѓа§®а•На§¶а§ња§∞-а§™а•Ба§®а§∞а•Н-а§®а§Ња§ґа§Г #а•©а•Ђа•≠

Event occured on 1665-11-30 (gregorian). Julian date was converted to Gregorian in this reckoning.

On this day, Awrangzeb ordered redestruction of temples being reconstructed in Gujarat.

As it has come to His MajestyвАЩs knowledge that some inhabitants of the mahals appertaining to the province of Gujarat have again built the temples which had been demolished by imperial order before his accession…therefore, His Majesty orders that the formerly demolished and recently restored temples should be pulled down.

а§™а•На§∞а§≤а§ѓ-а§Ха§≤а•На§™а§Ња§¶а§ња§Г

Observed on ≈Ъukla-NavamƒЂ tithi of MƒБrga≈ЫƒЂrбє£aбЄ• (lunar) month (AparƒБhбєЗaбЄ•/vyaapti).

pralaya-kalpƒБdiбЄ• is observed on this day. Performing ≈ЫrƒБddha on this day gives akбє£ayatrћ•pti to pitrs. Although there are 30 Kalpadis described in various puranas, 7 of them are particularly special.

а§Еа•Юа•На•Ыа§≤а•Н-а§Ца§Ња§®-а§µа§Іа§Ња§§а•Н а•Іа•© а§¶а§ња§®а§Ѓа•Н #а•©а•ђа•©

Event occured on 1659-12-03 (gregorian). Julian date was converted to Gregorian in this reckoning.

Day 13 (after Afzal’s death): Supe, Tambe, Pali, Nerle, Kameri, Visapur, Save Uran, Koley are all taken.

Details

  • Tags:
а§Ча•Аа§§а§Њ-а§Ьа§ѓа§®а•На§§а•А

Observed on ≈Ъukla-ƒТkƒБda≈ЫƒЂ tithi of MƒБrga≈ЫƒЂrбє£aбЄ• (lunar) month (S≈Ђry≈НdayaбЄ•/puurvaviddha).

Details
  • Edit config file
  • Tags: PuranaEvents CommonFestivals
а§Ьа§ѓа§™а§Ња§≤-а§™а§∞а§Ња§Ьа§ѓа§Г а§™а•Ба§∞а•Ба§Ја§™а•Ба§∞а•З #а•Іа•¶а•®а•І

Event occured on 1001-12-03 (gregorian). Julian date was converted to Gregorian in this reckoning.

Army of Sultan Mahmud bin Sebuktigin (Mahmud of Ghazni) defeated the Hindu Shahi army of Jayapala, near Peshawar. Jayapala was defeated, bound and paraded, before being released for ransom (sent by his son AnandapAla). He later immolated himself in a funeral pyre. mahmUd’s secretary Al-Utbi in Tarikh Yamini: “The friends of God defeated their obstinate opponents, and quickly put them to a complete rout. Noon had not arrived when the Musulmans had wreaked their vengeance on the infidel enemies of God, killing 15,000 of them, spreading them like a carpet over the ground, and making them food for beasts and birds of prey.”

Context: Alp Tigin, a Turkik slave soldier of Khorasan had seized garjanapura (ghazna) and started a dynasty (962). After his son died, slave soldiers Bilge Tegin and B√ґri tigin succeeded. Finally, his slave Sebuk Tigin (who’d married his daughter) succeeded (977), and captured kAndahAr (Alexandria). He defeated JayapAla twice, and annexed further territory. His son mahmUd (a devout muslim who thought of himself as “the Shadow of the God on Earth”) succeeded him in 997. Following recognition by Abbasid caliphate in 999, he pledged a jihad and a raid on India every year.

Details
  • Edit config file
  • Tags:
а§Єа•На§Ѓа§Ња§∞а•На§§-а§Ѓа•Ла§Ха•На§Ја§¶а§Њ-а§Па§Ха§Ња§¶а§ґа•А

The Shukla-paksha Ekadashi of mƒБrga≈ЫƒЂrбє£a month is known as m≈Нkбє£adƒБ-ƒУkƒБda≈ЫƒЂ.

а§Йа§§а•На§Єа§µа§Ња§Г

  • а§Оа§Єа•На§Яа§ња§µ-а§¶а•На§µа•Аа§™-а§Ча•На§∞а§єа§£а§Ѓа•Н #а•©а•©а•ѓ, а§Ха§Ња§∞а•На§§а•На§§а§ња§Ча•И-а§Юа§Ња§ѓа§ња§±а•На§±а•Ба§Ха•На§Ха§ња§іа§Ѓа•И, а§Ха•Иа§ґа§ња§Х-а§Па§Ха§Ња§¶а§ґа•А, а§Ча•Ба§∞а•Ба§µа§Ња§ѓа•Ба§™а•Ба§∞-а§Па§Ха§Ња§¶а§ґа•А, а§µа•Иа§Ја•На§£а§µ-а§Ѓа•Ла§Ха•На§Ја§¶а§Њ-а§Па§Ха§Ња§¶а§ґа•А, а§єа§∞а§ња§µа§Ња§Єа§∞а§Г
а§Оа§Єа•На§Яа§ња§µ-а§¶а•На§µа•Аа§™-а§Ча•На§∞а§єа§£а§Ѓа•Н #а•©а•©а•ѓ

Event occured on 1683-12-04 (gregorian). Julian date was converted to Gregorian in this reckoning.

On 24 November 1683 at night, when the tide was low, Sambhaji’s full force attacked the unsuspecting fort and village on Santo Est√™v√£o island. They captured the fort and plundered its village. A battalion of 200 men marched from mainland Goa in order to recapture the island. Seeing the size of the Maratha army, and the devastation caused by them, the battalion retreated to the capital City of Goa

The Shukla-paksha Ekadashi of vrћ•≈ЫchikamƒБsa is known as guruvƒБyupura-ƒУkƒБda≈ЫƒЂ.

а§єа§∞а§ња§µа§Ња§Єа§∞а§Г

The first quarter of dvƒБda≈ЫƒЂ tithi is not suitable for breaking fast (pƒБraбєЗa), and is known as harivƒБsaraбЄ•. Break fast once harivƒБsaraбЄ• is over.

а§Ха•Иа§ґа§ња§Х-а§Па§Ха§Ња§¶а§ґа•А

The Shukla-paksha Ekadashi of vrћ•≈ЫchikamƒБsa is also celebrated as kai≈Ыika-ƒУkƒБda≈ЫƒЂ. Kaisika Puranam, consisting of 82 shlokas describes the story of ta:nampƒБбЄНuvƒБn and a rƒБkбє£asa who attained mukti by nƒБmasaбєЕkƒЂrtanam and the fruits of ta:nampƒБбЄНuvƒБn’s nƒБmasaбєЕkƒЂrtanam, respectively!

а•Іа•ѓа•≠а•І а§§а§Ѓа•З а§µа§∞а•На§Ја•З а§™а§Ња§Ха§ња§Єа•На§§а§Ња§®а§Ѓа§∞а•Ба§∞а§Ња§Ја•На§Яа•На§∞-а§µа§ња§Ѓа§Ња§®а•Иа§Г а§™а•На§∞а§єа§Ња§∞а§Г #а•Ђа•І

Event occured on 1971-12-05 (gregorian).

On the evening of 3 December, at about 17:40, the Islamic repulic of Pakistan Air Force (PAF) (<50 planes) launched surprise strikes on 11 airfields in north-western India, including Agra, which was 480 kilometres (300 mi) from the border.

а§Ха•Иа§ґа§ња§Х-а§¶а•На§µа§Ња§¶а§ґа•А

Read kai≈Ыika purƒБбєЗam on this day. Special celebrations in Thirukurungudi Divya Desham Temple.

Details
  • Edit config file

а§≤а•Ла§Ща•На§Ча•За§µа§Ња§≤а§Њ а§ѓа•Ба§¶а•На§Іа§Ѓа•Н #а•Ђа•І

Event occured on 1971-12-05 (gregorian).

120 Indian soldiers stubbornly hold back 2,000 pAkistAni Islamist soldiers aided by 40 tanks all night till at dawn the IAF Hawker Hunters and Maruts picked off the remaining tanks.

tanoTamAtA’s blessings

The main Indian anti-tank weapon at Longewala was a jeep-mounted recoilless rifle. It had been supposed to be withdrawn and re-assigned the day before the engagement; yet due to mysterious happenstance had been significantly delayed and unable to leave before the reports came in of the impending Pakistani armoured thrust. It was to prove vital in the ensuing defence. As were the Indian artillery-pieces nearby that had only just managed to be deployed scant hours before the commencement of the assault.

… Pakistani tanks began a barrage on the village but by Tanot Mata’s grace enemy tanks got stuck in the sand for several hours, giving time to the Indian Air Force to pick them off one by one.

Aftermath

200 soldiers of Islamic state of Pakistan killed, 36 tanks destroyed. 2 Indian soldiers and 5 camels at their service died.

  • 17:48вЖТ19:23

Pradosha Vratam. Fast during the day and perform ≈Ыivap≈ЂjƒБ in Pradosha Kala. Pradosha vratam is even more special, when if falls on a Monday/Saturday.

а§Ха•Га§§а•На§§а§ња§Ха§Њ-а§µа•На§∞а§§а§Ѓа•Н

Observed on every occurrence of Krћ•ttikƒБ nakshatra (S≈ЂryƒБstamayaбЄ•/puurvaviddha).

krћ•ttikƒБ-vratam for Lord Subrahmanya. Observe fast for the entire day, and obtain blessings of all the krћ•ttikƒБ-striyaбЄ• who raised skanda after His birth. Three Vratas are very special for Subrahmanya—the bhrћ•guvƒБra-subrahmaбєЗya-vratam in tulƒБmƒБsa, this regular krћ•ttikƒБ vratam, and skandaбє£aбє£бє≠hivratam.

а§Ѓа§Ња§∞а•На§Ча§ґа•Аа§∞а•На§Ја•З а§ґа•Ба§Ха•На§≤а§™а§Юа•На§Ъа§¶а§ґа•На§ѓа§Ња§В а§Ѓа•Га§Ча§ґа§ња§∞а•Ла§ѓа•Ба§§а§Ња§ѓа§Ња§В а§Ъа•Ва§∞а•На§£а§ња§§а§≤а§µа§£а§Єа•На§ѓ а§Єа•Ба§µа§∞а•На§£а•За§® а§™а•На§∞а§Єа•На§•а§Ѓа•За§Ха§В а§Ъа§®а•На§¶а•На§∞а•Ла§¶а§ѓа•З а§ђа•На§∞а§Ња§єа•На§Ѓа§£а§Ња§ѓ а§™а•На§∞а§§а§ња§™а§Ња§¶а§ѓа•За§§а•На•§ а§Еа§®а•За§® а§Ха§∞а•На§Ѓа§£а§Њ а§∞а•Ва§™а§Єа•Ма§≠а§Ња§Ча•На§ѓа§≤а§Ња§≠а•Л а§Ьа§Ња§ѓа§§а•З а§За§§а§њ а§µа§ња§Ја•На§£а•Ба§®а•Ла§Ха•На§§а§В а§Єа•Ба§µа§∞а•На§£а§Єа§єа§ња§§а§Ъа•Ва§∞а•На§£а§ња§§а§≤а§µа§£а§¶а§Ња§®а§Ѓа•На•§ а§§а§§а•На§∞а§Ња§™а§њ а§Ъа§®а•На§¶а•На§∞а•Ла§¶а§ѓа§µа•На§ѓа§Ња§™а§ња§®а•На§ѓа•За§µ а§Ча•На§∞а§Ња§єа•На§ѓа§Ња•§

  • Edit config file
  • Tags: PurnimaDays
а§Ѓа§∞а•Ва§®а•На§Ѓа§§а•На§§а•Иа§Г а§°а•Жа§Ха•На§Ха§®-а§єа•Жа§∞а§Ња§≤а•На§°а•Н-а§™а§§а•На§∞а§ња§Ха§Њ-а§Ха§Ња§∞а•На§ѓа§Ња§≤а§ѓа•Л а§¶а§Ча•На§Іа§Г #а•©а•ђ

Event occured on 1986-12-07 (gregorian).

About 5,000 Moslems tried to burn office of the paper, The Deccan Herald, after the paper had printed a short story in its Sunday magazine titled ‘‘Mohammad the Idiot.’’ The story (translated from maLayALam, depicting rural life in Kerala) concerned a handicapped youth named Mohammad, but the Moslems, who make up 10 percent of the city’s population, asserted that a reference to him as ‘‘a deaf and dumb prophet’’ was an insult to their religion. - NYT summary

“Four people were killed and nearly 50 were injured in riots here today.” - NYT on Dec 8th

“The larger part of the blame for the violence must devolve on Muslim leaders, among whom former Congress(I) minister C.M. Ibrahim was allegedly in the forefront, who whipped up passions in the community by deliberately distorting what the story had said.” - India Today.

  • Tags:

pƒБrvaбєЗavratam on the eve of p≈ЂrбєЗa-sthƒБlƒЂpƒБkaбЄ•.

а§Жа§Ча•На§∞а§ѓа§£-а§єа•Ла§Ѓа§Г а§¶а•На§∞а§Ња§µа§ња§°а•За§Ја•Б

Observed on PaurбєЗamƒБsƒЂ tithi of Vrћ•≈ЫcikaбЄ• (sidereal solar) month (S≈Ђry≈НdayaбЄ•/puurvaviddha).

Perform h≈Нma with fresh rice from paddy.

Observed on PaurбєЗamƒБsƒЂ tithi of MƒБrga≈ЫƒЂrбє£aбЄ• (lunar) month (S≈Ђry≈НdayaбЄ•/puurvaviddha).

Details
  • Edit config file
  • Tags: OtherJayantis CommonFestivals
а§Ха§Ња§Юа•На§Ъа•А а•Іа•© а§Ьа§Ча§¶а•На§Ча•Ба§∞а•Б а§ґа•На§∞а•А-а§Єа§Ъа•На§Ъа§ња§¶а•На§Ша§®а•За§®а•На§¶а•На§∞ а§Єа§∞а§Єа•На§µа§§а•А а§Жа§∞а§Ња§Іа§®а§Њ #а•Іа•≠а•Ђа•І

Observed on Krћ•бє£бєЗa-PrathamƒБ tithi of MƒБrga≈ЫƒЂrбє£aбЄ• (lunar) month (AparƒБhбєЗaбЄ•/vyaapti). The event occurred in 3373 (Kali era).

Then, the preceptor ≈ЪrƒЂ Cidghana, having governed or held the responsibilities of ƒАcƒБrya PƒЂбє≠ha for thirtyseven years, placed his disciple ≈ЪrƒЂ VidyƒБghana, who was known as ≈ЪrƒЂ NƒБyana in P≈ЂrvƒБ≈Ыrama before initiation, in the Maбє≠ha; adhering to ascetic principles, wandering like a child, He vanished in the divine form of ƒ™≈Ыvara. ≈ЪrƒЂ SacchidƒБnanda, named ≈Ъeбє£a (before initiation), son of ≈ЪrƒЂdhrapaбєЗбЄНita, born on the banks of river GaruбЄНa, disciple of Preceptor Chandra≈Ыekahara having enjoyed the bliss through spiritual practices for sixty-nine years, and at the end of life entered into the ≈ЪivaliбєЕgaвАФKƒБyƒБdhirohane≈Ыvara. The great preceptor, the transcendental, immaculate attained the supreme state devoid of pains, beyond everything, imperishable and infinite on the first day of the dark fortnight in the month of MƒБrga≈ЫƒЂrбє£a in the year Khara.

а§™а•Ва§∞а•На§£-а§Єа•На§•а§Ња§≤а•Аа§™а§Ња§Ха§Г

Observed on Krћ•бє£бєЗa-PrathamƒБ tithi of every (lunar) month (P≈ЂrvƒБhбєЗaбЄ•/puurvaviddha). sthƒБlƒЂpakaбЄ• is an important fortnightly ritual, involving the offering of haviбє£yƒБnna to agni, with the offering being cooked on the fire itself.

а§Йа§§а•На§Єа§µа§Ња§Г

  • а§∞а•И-а§≤а•Аа§≤а§Ња§ља§™а§єа•Га§§а§Єа•На§§а•На§∞а•А а§∞а§Ха•На§Ја§§а§њ #а•≠а•ђ, а§Єа§Ња§ѓа§®-а§µа•Иа§Іа•Га§§а§ња§Г
а§∞а•И-а§≤а•Аа§≤а§Ња§ља§™а§єа•Га§§а§Єа•На§§а•На§∞а•А а§∞а§Ха•На§Ја§§а§њ #а•≠а•ђ

Event occured on 1946-12-09 (gregorian).

On this day, Leela Roy reached Ramganj on 9 December, walking 90 miles on foot from Chaumohani in an effort to rescue kidnapped Hindu girls after the Noakhali riots. She recovered 1,307 abducted girls. Her organisation, the National Services Institute, set up 17 relief camps.

Context

Great numbers of Hindu women were gang-raped and kidnapped after the Noakhali riots. On 20 October, at a meeting of the Chattogram Mahila Sangha, the Chittagong branch of the All India Women’s Conference, presided over by Nellie Sengupta, a resolution was passed that the organisation would work for the relief and recovery of the abducted Hindu women. The Noakhali Relief Committee was formed. From 26 October onwards, the committee began to send a group of volunteers led by Ashoka Gupta to Noakhali for relief operations on a weekly basis.

In December, the Srihatta Mahila Sangha decided to send Kiranshashi Deb, Leela Dasgupta, Saralabala Deb and Suhasini Das to Noakhali for relief work.

  • Tags:
а§Єа§Ња§ѓа§®-а§µа•Иа§Іа•Га§§а§ња§Г

а§™а§∞а§ґа•Ба§∞а§Ња§Ѓ-а§Ьа§ѓа§®а•На§§а•А

Observed on Krћ•бє£бєЗa-DvitƒЂyƒБ tithi of MƒБrga≈ЫƒЂrбє£aбЄ• (lunar) month (S≈Ђry≈НdayaбЄ•/puurvaviddha).

Jayanti of Parashurama, who incarnated to destroy Dushta Kshatriyas.

When the sum of the longitudes of the Moon and Sun is 360, it is sƒБyana-vaidhrћ•tiбЄ•, and a y≈НgaбЄ• that is to be excluded for auspicious activities.

а§Йа§§а•На§Єа§µа§Ња§Г

  • а•Ыа•Ла§∞а§Ња§µа§∞а§Єа§ња§Ва§є-а§Ѓа•Га§§а•На§ѓа•Ба§Г #а•Іа•Ѓа•І
а•Ыа•Ла§∞а§Ња§µа§∞а§Єа§ња§Ва§є-а§Ѓа•Га§§а•На§ѓа•Ба§Г #а•Іа•Ѓа•І

Event occured on 1841-12-12 (gregorian).

On this day died the Kahluria Rajput general Zorawar Singh (under Gulab Singh) on his remarkable Tibetan expedition, after his pilgrimage to mAnasasarovara and kailAsa. Snow had caused supplies to the Dogra army to fail despite Zorawar’s preparations. In the early exchange of fire the Rajput general was wounded in his right shoulder but he grabbed a sword in his left hand. The Tibetan horsemen then charged the Dogra position and one of them thrust his lance in Zorawar Singh’s chest.

He had captured Taklakot fort in Tibet near mAnasasarovara and Mt KailAsa - just 15 miles from nepAl.

  • Tags:

а•®а•¶а•¶а•І а§µа§∞а•На§Ја•З а§Єа§Ња§Ва§Єа§¶а§≠а§µа§®а•З а§Ѓа§∞а•Ба§∞а§Ња§Ха•На§Ја§Єа§™а•На§∞а§єа§Ња§∞а§Г #а•®а•І

Event occured on 2001-12-13 (gregorian).

Islamic terrorists belonging to Lashkar-e-Taiba (LeT “Army of the Pure”) and Jaish-e-Mohammed (JeM, “Army of Muhammad”) attack Indian parliament. Deaths: 9 Indians (Constable Kamlesh Kumari of CRPF who raised the alarm), and 5 jihAdis. Injured: 18.

  • Tags:

а§Йа§§а•На§Єа§µа§Ња§Г

  • а§Жа§∞а•Ба§Ѓа•Ба§Ц-а§®а§Ња§µа§≤а§∞а•Н-а§Ча•Ба§∞а•Ба§™а•Ва§Ьа•И #а•Іа•™а•™, а§®а§Ња§∞а§Ња§ѓа§£а•Аа§ѓа§В-а§Ьа§ѓа§®а•На§§а•А #а•™а•©а•≠
а§Жа§∞а•Ба§Ѓа•Ба§Ц-а§®а§Ња§µа§≤а§∞а•Н-а§Ча•Ба§∞а•Ба§™а•Ва§Ьа•И #а•Іа•™а•™

Observed on MaghƒБ nakshatra of Vrћ•≈ЫcikaбЄ• (sidereal solar) month (PrƒБtaбЄ•/paraviddha). The event occurred in 1879 (Gregorian era).

Event

On 5 December, at his residence, а§Ѓа§Ња§єа•За§ґа•На§µа§∞-s gathered to recite the а§¶а•На§∞а§Ња§µа§ња§°-а§Єа•На§§а•Ла§§а•На§∞ around him, knowing that the hour of his а§ґа§ња§µа§™а§¶а§™а•На§∞а§Ња§™а•На§§а§њ was fast approaching. Sporting а§∞а•Ба§¶а•На§∞а§Ња§Ха•На§Ј-s all over his person, sipping а§Ча§Ща•На§Ча§Ња§Ьа§≤ & having applied the sacred ash from а§Ъа§ња§¶а§Ѓа•На§ђа§∞а§Ѓа•Н, а§Ѓа§¶а•Ба§∞а•И, а§Ха§Ња§ґа§њ & а§§а§ња§∞а•Ба§Ъа•Жа§®а•На§¶а•Ва§∞а•Н, he looked like a veritable а§ґа§ња§µа§Ча§£-а§®а§Ња§ѓа§Х, who was merely in human guise on earth. At around 9 PM, he lifted his weak hands, one last time, to place upon his head as a humble salutation to the supreme god of gods & then gave up his last breath.

Context

≈ЪrƒЂ NƒБvalarвАЩs last public discourse was on а§Жа§°а§њ-а§Єа•На§µа§Ња§§а§њ of the tamizh calendar in 1879, the а§Ча•Ба§∞а•Ба§™а•Ва§Ьа§Њ of а§ґа•На§∞а•А-а§Єа•Ба§®а•На§¶а§∞а§Ѓа•Ва§∞а•На§§а§њ-а§®а§Ња§ѓа§®а§Ња§∞а•Н, the friend of а§Ѓа§єа§Ња§¶а•За§µ. His health began to deteriorate over the next few months. The daily а§Жа§§а•На§Ѓа§Ња§∞а•На§•-а§™а•Ва§Ьа§Њ he would do with so much devotion; he was unable to do it any longer & a а§ґа§ња§µа§Ња§Ъа§Ња§∞а•На§ѓ from а§µа•За§¶а§Ња§∞а§£а•На§ѓа§Ѓа•Н would do it on his behalf.

Major celebrations

In а§Єа§ња§Ва§єа§™а•Ба§∞а•А, the а§Ча•Ба§∞а•Ба§™а•Ва§Ьа§Њ of а§Жа§±а•Ба§Ѓа•Ба§Ц-а§®а§Ња§µа§≤а§∞а•Н (the day he attained а§ґа§ња§µа§™а§¶) is done without fail at а§ґа•Жа§£а•На§™а§Х (а§Ъа§Ѓа•На§™а§Х) а§µа§ња§®а§Ња§ѓа§Х temple every year on а§Ѓа§Ша§Њ-а§®а§Ха•На§Ја§§а•На§∞ of а§Ха§Ња§∞а•На§§а•На§§а§ња§Ха§Њ-а§Ѓа§Ња§Є as per the tamizh calendar.

а§®а§Ња§∞а§Ња§ѓа§£а•Аа§ѓа§В-а§Ьа§ѓа§®а•На§§а•А #а•™а•©а•≠

Observed on day 28 of Vrћ•≈ЫcikaбЄ• (sidereal solar) month (S≈Ђry≈НdayaбЄ•/puurvaviddha). The event occurred in 4687 (Kali era).

Celebration of completion of Narayaniyam (Kollam 762/1586 CE), in Guruvayur temple.

а§Ха§Ња§Юа•На§Ъа•А а•™ а§Ьа§Ча§¶а•На§Ча•Ба§∞а•Б а§ґа•На§∞а•А-а§Єа§§а•На§ѓа§ђа•Ла§Іа•За§®а•На§¶а•На§∞ а§Єа§∞а§Єа•На§µа§§а•А а§Жа§∞а§Ња§Іа§®а§Њ #а•®а•®а•ѓа•¶

Observed on Krћ•бє£бєЗa-Aбє£бє≠amƒЂ tithi of MƒБrga≈ЫƒЂrбє£aбЄ• (lunar) month (AparƒБhбєЗaбЄ•/vyaapti). The event occurred in 2834 (Kali era).

The saint Satyabodha, by name PhalinƒЂ≈Ыa (before initiation into sainthood), son of TƒБбєЗбЄНava≈Ыarma living on the banks of ƒАmrƒБvatƒЂ river, the noble preceptor, who authored commentatorial and VƒБrtika texts on Advaita VedƒБnta bore the responsibilities of preceptor. Then, ≈ЪrƒЂ Satyabodha, who lived for ninety six years in KƒБ√±ci in the Maбє≠ha called ≈ЪƒБradƒБ, making unrestrained the systems of haughty KumƒБrila, Buddhists, Jains, PrabhƒБkara, KaбєЗƒБda and Akбє£apƒБda and having shattered the enemies by the text Padaka≈Ыata realised his Self on the eighth day of the dark fortnight in the year Nandana.

а§Жа§Ѓа•На§∞а§Ња§µа§§а•Аа§§а§Яа§Ьа§§а§Ња§£а•На§°а§µа§ґа§∞а•На§Ѓа§Єа•Ва§®а•Ба§Г а§ґа•На§∞а•Аа§Єа§§а•На§ѓа§ђа•Ла§Іа§®а§ња§ѓа§Ѓа•А а§Ђа§≤а§ња§®а•Аа§ґа§®а§Ња§Ѓа§Ња•§

а§¶а•Га§™а•На§ѓа§§а•На§§а•Ма§§а§Ња§§а§ња§§а§Ња§∞а•На§єа§Ьа•На§Ьа§ња§®а§Ча•Ба§∞а•Ба§Ха§£а§≠а•Ба§Ха•На§™а§ґа•На§ѓа§¶а§Ща•На§Ша•На§∞а•На§ѓа§Ња§¶а§ња§§а§®а•На§§а•На§∞а§Ѓа•На•§
а§®а§ња§∞а•На§ѓа§®а•На§§а•На§∞а§В а§®а§ња§∞а•На§Ѓа§ња§Ѓа§Ња§£а§Г а§™а§¶а§Ха§ґа§§а§єа§§а§Ња§∞а§Ња§§а§ња§Ха•Ма§§а§Єа•На§Ха•Ба§§а•Ла§Ха•На§§а§ња§Г
а§Єа§Ња§Ха•На§Ја§Ња§Ъа•На§Ыа•На§∞а•Аа§Єа§§а•На§ѓа§ђа•Ла§Іа•Ла§ља§Ха•Га§§ а§Єа§єа§ђа§єа•Ба§≤а§Ња§Ја•На§Яа§Ѓа•На§ѓа§єа•З а§®а§®а•На§¶а§®а•З а§Єа•На§µа§Ѓа•На••а•Іа•Іа••
вАФа§™а•Ба§£а•На§ѓа§ґа•На§≤а•Ла§Ха§Ѓа§Юа•На§Ьа§∞а•А

а§Ца§Ња§£а•На§°а•За§∞а§Ња§µа•За§£ а§Ча•Жа§Ьа•На§Ьа§≤а§єа§≥а•На§≥а§њ-а§ѓа•Ба§¶а•На§Іа•З а§Ьа§ѓа§Г #а•®а•ђа•®

Event occured on 1760-12-16 (gregorian).

On this day, khANDe rAv, the royalist divAn of Krishnaraja Wodeyar II, thoroughly defeated Haidar Ali in the battle of Nanjangud-Haradanahalli near Gejjalahalli Pass.

Context
  • Khande Rao came in contact with Haidar Ali in August 1756 when the king entrusted him with 50k gold pieces to be given to Sahbas Sahib (brother of Haidar) and Haidar to enable them to raise an army to defeat the Dalawai brothers who had virtually imprisoned him (the king) in his own palace.
  • Haidar rose to power under Khande Rao with the countenence of Karachuri Nanjarajaiah. In 1758, Khande Rao was made “Dewan” on the recommendation of Haidar and the Dalawais (including Karachuri Nanjarajaiah) were side-lined.
  • By 1759, it was clear that Haidar was getting more and more revenue districts assigned to himself and Khande Rao had seen through Haidar’s intention to fleece the king.
  • The Wodeyar King sought the assistance of the Mahratta army and Khande Rao wrote several letters to George Pigout, Governor General at Madras for help.
  • On 26th August 1760, Khande Rao attacked Haidar at Srirangapatna but let Haidar flee out of sentiment, with the promise that he would retire away from maisUru. Haidar did not keep his promise - he tried regrouping and attacking.
Aftermath
  • Sadly, shortly thereafter marATha forces were recalled after the defeat at pANIpat.
  • Haidar rushed to the feet of the dalvai Karachuri Nanjarajaiah - the latter was swayed and basically let Haidar act on his behalf - sowing utter confusion in the maisUru king’s troops. This ultimately led to the capture of khANDe rAv on 20th June 1761. khANDe rAv was put in an iron cage in bengaLUru, where he died next year.
Details

  • Tags:
а§Ѓа§Ња§∞а•На§Ча§ґа•Аа§∞а•На§Ј-а§Еа§Ја•На§Яа§Ха§Њ-а§ґа•На§∞а§Ња§¶а•На§Іа§Ѓа•Н

Observed on Krћ•бє£бєЗa-Aбє£бє≠amƒЂ tithi of MƒБrga≈ЫƒЂrбє£aбЄ• (lunar) month (AparƒБhбєЗaбЄ•/vyaapti).

а§™а§Ња§Ха§ња§Єа•На§§а§Ња§®-а§™а•Ва§∞а•На§µ-а§™а§Ха•На§Ј-а§Ха§∞а•На§§а§®а§Ѓа•Н #а•Ђа•І

Event occured on 1971-12-16 (gregorian).

Genocidal Pakistan Islamic Republic army (93,000 - mostly eastern command soldiers) surrendered to Indian forces at DhAka.

Details
  • Edit config file
  • Tags:
а§™а§Юа•На§Ъ-а§™а§∞а•На§µ-а§™а•Ва§Ьа§Њ (а§Еа§Ја•На§Яа§Ѓа•А)

Observed on Krћ•бє£бєЗa-Aбє£бє≠amƒЂ tithi of every (lunar) month (ƒА≈ЫvinaбЄ•/paraviddha).

Details
  • Edit config file
  • Tags: Pancha Parva
а§∞а§µа§њ-а§Єа§Ща•На§Ха•На§∞а§Ѓа§£-а§™а•Ба§£а•На§ѓа§Ха§Ња§≤а§Г
  • 06:37вЖТ15:55

16 ghatikas on either side of the transition of the Sun are sacred for various observances. In addition to specific puбєЗyakƒБlas like бє£aбЄНa≈ЫƒЂti, viбє£бєЗupadƒЂ etc., this is also useful, especially in cases where the other puбєЗyakƒБlas are inconvenient for appropriate performance of rituals such as snƒБna, dƒБna, tarpaбєЗa, etc.

Details
  • Edit config file
  • Tags: SunSankranti CommonFestivals
а§Єа§Ща•На§Ха•На§∞а§Ѓа§£-а§¶а§ња§®-а§™а•Ва§∞а•На§µа§Ња§єа•На§£-а§™а•Ба§£а•На§ѓа§Ха§Ња§≤а§Г
  • 06:37вЖТ12:15

When the transit of the Sun (saбєЕkrƒБnti) happens in the first half of the day (p≈ЂrvƒБhбєЗa) or after midnight of the previous day, the first half of the day is a puбєЗyakƒБla for various observances. In addition to 16 ghatikas on either side of the transition, and specific puбєЗyakƒБlas like бє£aбЄНa≈ЫƒЂti, viбє£бєЗupadƒЂ etc., this is also useful, especially in cases where the other puбєЗyakƒБlas are inconvenient for appropriate performance of rituals such as snƒБna, dƒБna, tarpaбєЗa, etc.

Details

  • Tags: SunSankranti CommonFestivals

а§Йа§§а•На§Єа§µа§Ња§Г

  • а§ђа•Ба§®а•На§¶а•За§≤-а§Ча•Ла§µа§ња§®а•На§¶-а§∞а§Ња§µ-а§µа•Аа§∞а§Ча§§а§ња§Г #а•®а•ђа•®, а§Ѓа§Ња§∞а•На§Ча§ґа•Аа§∞а•На§Ј-а§Еа§®а•На§µа§Ја•На§Яа§Ха§Њ-а§ґа•На§∞а§Ња§¶а•На§Іа§Ѓа•Н, а§ґа•На§∞а•А-а§ґа•За§Ја§Ња§¶а•На§∞а§њ-а§Єа•На§µа§Ња§Ѓа§њ-а§Жа§∞а§Ња§Іа§®а§Њ #а•ѓа•™
а§ђа•Ба§®а•На§¶а•За§≤-а§Ча•Ла§µа§ња§®а•На§¶-а§∞а§Ња§µ-а§µа•Аа§∞а§Ча§§а§ња§Г #а•®а•ђа•®

Event occured on 1760-12-17 (gregorian).

On this day, govinda-pant bundele with 500 men, on a foraging mission in the antarvedI, was surprised by an Afghan force near Meerut and killed. He was always known to be the greatest вАШFund raiserвАЩ of the Maratha Empire.

Context

The marATha-s were trapped in pAnIpat, encircled by afghans and allies after they crossed the yamunA.

Aftermath

This was followed by the loss of a contingent of 2,000 Maratha soldiers who had left Delhi to deliver money and rations to Panipat.

а§Йа§§а•На§Єа§µа§Ња§Г

  • а§Жа§¶а§ња§§а•На§ѓа§єа§Єа•На§§-а§ѓа•Ла§Ча§Г, а§§а•Иа§Ѓа•Ва§∞а•За§£ а§≤а•Ла§®а§њ-а§єа§§а•На§ѓа§Њ #а•ђа•®а•™
а§Жа§¶а§ња§§а•На§ѓа§єа§Єа•На§§-а§ѓа•Ла§Ча§Г
  • вЖТ10:16

When Hasta nakshatra falls on a Sunday, it is a special y≈НgaбЄ•. When Rohini nakshatra falls on a Saturday, it is a special y≈НgaбЄ•. In the cyclic rotation of time, along with the bad combinations of grahas and nakshatras that indicate the probability of upcoming difficulties, good combinations that grant benefits in multiples also arise. Among such good combinations are the Amrita Siddhi yogas of certain weekdays and nakshatras. They are Sunday-Hasta, Monday-Mrigashirsha, Tuesday-Ashvini, Wednesday-Anuradha, Thursday-Pushya, Friday-Revati, Saturday-Rohini. Good deeds performed on such yogas become especially strong in protecting and nourishing us. For instance, in Devi Atharvashirsha, it is said bhaumƒБ≈ЫvinyƒБбєБ mahƒБdevƒЂ-sannidhau japtvƒБ mahƒБmrћ•tyuбєБ tarati, that is, one can cross even mahƒБmrћ•tyu by doing parayanam when Tuesday and Ashvini join.

а§Жа§¶а§ња§§а•На§ѓа§єа§Єа•На§§а•З а§Ча•Ба§∞а•Ба§™а•Ба§Ја•На§ѓа§ѓа•Ла§Ча•З а§ђа•Ба§Іа§Ња§®а•Ба§∞а§Ња§Іа§Њ а§ґа§®а§ња§∞а•Ла§єа§ња§£а•А а§Ъа•§
а§Єа•Ла§Ѓа•З а§Ъ а§Єа•Ма§Ѓа•На§ѓа§В а§≠а•Га§Ча•Ба§∞а•За§µа§§а•А а§Ъ а§≠а•Ма§Ѓа§Ња§ґа•На§µа§ња§®а•А а§Ъа§Ња§Ѓа•Га§§а§Єа§ња§¶а•На§Іа§ња§ѓа•Ла§Ча§Ња§Га••

Details
  • Edit config file
  • Tags: RareDays Combinations AmritaSiddhiYogaDays
а§§а•Иа§Ѓа•Ва§∞а•За§£ а§≤а•Ла§®а§њ-а§єа§§а•На§ѓа§Њ #а•ђа•®а•™

Event occured on 1398-12-18 (gregorian). Julian date was converted to Gregorian in this reckoning.

On this day, Taimur massacred about 100k Hindus in Loni which stood in the NE of Delhi.

Events (via MT)

On December 10th he proceed to attack the Loni that stood the north-east of Delhi, the Hindu defenders shaken by the loss of their chief failed to put an effective fight and were trashed by the Timurid army. Timur seized about 100,000 Hindus after the battle by encircling them in a crescent-like movement, even as their mass hunting expeditions on the steppe. He ordered his men to slaughter each one of them right away. He proudly describes how a Mullah who had not even killed a sparrow in the past now slew several Hindus with great enthusiasm.

Context

Timur was on his way to wrest Delhi and India from the Tughlaqs, who had weakened.

  • Tags:

Event occured on 1961-12-19 (gregorian).

Goa, much traumatized by missionaries (including the evil Jesuit Francis Xavier), inquisition and racist misrule, finally freed from Portuguese.

Event occured on 1927-12-19 (gregorian).

On this day, the Arya-samAjist paNDit rAma-prasAd bismil, a fine revolutionary and urdu/ Hindi poet was murdered by British in retaliation for the Kakori heist; as was his protege Ashfaqullah Khan.

а§Йа§§а•На§Єа§µа§Ња§Г

  • а§Ха§Ња§Юа•На§Ъа•А а•ђа•Ѓ а§Ьа§Ча§¶а•На§Ча•Ба§∞а•Б а§ґа•На§∞а•А-а§Ъа§®а•На§¶а•На§∞а§ґа•За§Ца§∞а•За§®а•На§¶а•На§∞ а§Єа§∞а§Єа•На§µа§§а•А а•≠ а§Жа§∞а§Ња§Іа§®а§Њ #а•®а•ѓ, а§Ца•Ва§≤а§®а§Њ-а§єа§§а•На§ѓа§Њ #а•≠а•©, а§Ча•Ла§µа§ња§®а•На§¶-а§™а§®а•На§§-а§єа§§а•На§ѓа§Њ #а•®а•ђа•®, а§Ѓа§Ња§©а§Ха•На§Ха§Юа•На§Ъа§Ња§± а§®а§Ња§ѓа§©а§Ња§∞а•Н (а•Іа•І) а§Ча•Ба§∞а•Ба§™а•Ва§Ьа•И, а§єа§∞а§ња§µа§Ња§Єа§∞а§Г
а§Ча•Ла§µа§ња§®а•На§¶-а§™а§®а•На§§-а§єа§§а•На§ѓа§Њ #а•®а•ђа•®

Event occured on 1760-12-20 (gregorian).

On this day, in the lead up to Panipat, the Marathas suffer a major setback as their veteran revenue collector Govind Pant, who was in charge of an extremely critical & strategic role, is killed in an overwhelming attack led by Atai Khan, the Durrani Wazir’s nephew.

Details

  • Tags:
а§єа§∞а§ња§µа§Ња§Єа§∞а§Г
  • вЖТ08:10

The first quarter of dvƒБda≈ЫƒЂ tithi is not suitable for breaking fast (pƒБraбєЗa), and is known as harivƒБsaraбЄ•. Break fast once harivƒБsaraбЄ• is over.

Observed on Krћ•бє£бєЗa-DvƒБda≈ЫƒЂ tithi of MƒБrga≈ЫƒЂrбє£aбЄ• (lunar) month (AparƒБhбєЗaбЄ•/vyaapti). The event occurred in 5095 (Kali era).

а§Ца•Ва§≤а§®а§Њ-а§єа§§а•На§ѓа§Њ #а•≠а•©

Event occured on 1949-12-20 (gregorian).

The District Superintendent of Police arrived in Kalshira (in Khulna) accompanied by armed police contingent and the paramilitary Ansars and attacked Kalshira and other neighbouring Hindu villages mercilessly. They encouraged Muslims from neighbouring villages to loot the Hindu properties. A number of Hindus were killed, men and women were forcibly converted. Images were broken and shrines were desecrated. All the 350 homesteads in the village, except three, were demolished. The cattle and boats were forcibly taken away. Within a month of the massacre 30,000 Hindus fled from Khulna to India.

Context: The previous day, four police constables raided the house of one Joydev Brahma in the village of Kalshira under Mollahat police station in Bagerhat sub-division in the district of Khulna, in search of some suspected communists, late in the night. Failed to find any suspects the constables tried to rape the wife of Brahma. Her cry alerted him and his companions, who in a desperate bid to save her attacked two constables, one of whom died on the spot. The remaining two raised an alarm and the neighbouring people came to their rescue.

а§Йа§§а•На§Єа§µа§Ња§Г

  • а§Ха•Ба§Ъа•За§≤-а§¶а§ња§®а§Ѓа•Н, а§™а§Юа•На§Ъ-а§™а§∞а•На§µ-а§™а•Ва§Ьа§Њ (а§Ъа§§а•Ба§∞а•На§¶а§ґа•А), а§™а•На§∞а§¶а•Ла§Ј-а§µа•На§∞а§§а§Ѓа•Н, а§ђа•Ба§Іа§Ња§®а•Ба§∞а§Ња§Іа§Њ-а§ѓа•Ла§Ча§Г, а§Ѓа§Ња§Єа§ґа§ња§µа§∞а§Ња§§а•На§∞а§ња§Г, а§ґа§Ѓа•На§≠а•Ба§∞а§Ња§Ьа•Л а§¶а•На§µа§Ња§¶а§ґа§¶а•За§ґа§В а§Ча•Га§єа•На§£а§Ња§§а§њ #а•©а•©а•ѓ, а§Єа§єа§Єа•На§ѓ-а§Ѓа§Ња§Єа§Г/а§Йа§§а•На§§а§∞а§Ња§ѓа§£а§Ѓа•Н
а§ђа•Ба§Іа§Ња§®а•Ба§∞а§Ња§Іа§Њ-а§ѓа•Ла§Ча§Г
  • 08:31вЖТ

When an≈ЂrƒБdhƒБ nakshatra falls on a Wednesday, it is a special y≈НgaбЄ• for performing dƒБnam. One can do dƒБnaбєБ of dadhy≈Нdanam in Vishnu temples on this day. When Rohini nakshatra falls on a Saturday, it is a special y≈НgaбЄ•. In the cyclic rotation of time, along with the bad combinations of grahas and nakshatras that indicate the probability of upcoming difficulties, good combinations that grant benefits in multiples also arise. Among such good combinations are the Amrita Siddhi yogas of certain weekdays and nakshatras. They are Sunday-Hasta, Monday-Mrigashirsha, Tuesday-Ashvini, Wednesday-Anuradha, Thursday-Pushya, Friday-Revati, Saturday-Rohini. Good deeds performed on such yogas become especially strong in protecting and nourishing us. For instance, in Devi Atharvashirsha, it is said bhaumƒБ≈ЫvinyƒБбєБ mahƒБdevƒЂ-sannidhau japtvƒБ mahƒБmrћ•tyuбєБ tarati, that is, one can cross even mahƒБmrћ•tyu by doing parayanam when Tuesday and Ashvini join.

а§Єа§єа§Єа•На§ѓ-а§Ѓа§Ња§Єа§Г/а§Йа§§а•На§§а§∞а§Ња§ѓа§£а§Ѓа•Н
  • 03:18вЖТ

Beginning of sahasya-mƒБsaбЄ•, marked by the transit of Sun into makara-rƒБshƒЂ. Importantly, this also marks the beginning of uttarƒБyaбєЗam, and the end of dakбє£iбєЗƒБyanam. This also marks the winter solstice. While nirayana saбєЕkrƒБnti’s are widely observed, tropical saбєЕkrƒБnti’s are also equally sacred, and have similar puбєЗyakƒБlas associated with them.

а§ґа§Ѓа•На§≠а•Ба§∞а§Ња§Ьа•Л а§¶а•На§µа§Ња§¶а§ґа§¶а•За§ґа§В а§Ча•Га§єа•На§£а§Ња§§а§њ #а•©а•©а•ѓ

Event occured on 1683-12-21 (gregorian). Julian date was converted to Gregorian in this reckoning.

Sambhaji’s army attacked Salsette and Bardez. Sambhaji had 6 thousand cavalry and 8-10 thousand infantry with him. Marathas plundered Bardesh and town of Madgaon. After having captured Salsette and Bardesh (Bardez) the Marathas were exerting to take the island of Goa as well. French factor of Surat Francois Martin has described the poor condition of the Portuguese, he said the viceroy was completely dependent on Mughal aid now.

а§ђа•Ла§Іа§Ња§ѓа§®-а§Ха§Ња§§а•На§ѓа§Ња§ѓа§®-а§Ѓа§Ња§∞а•На§Ча§ґа•Аа§∞а•На§Ј-а§Еа§Ѓа§Ња§µа§Ња§Єа•На§ѓа§Њ
а§Ча§£а§ња§§а§Ьа•На§Ю-а§∞а§Ња§Ѓа§Ња§®а•Ба§Ь-а§Ьа§®а•На§Ѓ #а•Іа•©а•Ђ

Event occured on 1887-12-22 (gregorian).

The fine autodidact pure math genius rAmAnujan was born by the grace of nAmagiri-amma to shrInivAsa ayyangAr. Under the devI’s inspiration, he made substantial contributions to mathematical analysis, number theory, infinite series, and continued fractions, including solutions to mathematical problems then considered unsolvable. Ramanujan initially developed his own mathematical research in isolation. Finally he succeeded in getting GH Hardy’s attention and patronage. He cried as they cut his shikhA. Used to recite sanskrit conjugations. Died at age 32. As late as 2011 and again in 2012, researchers continued to discover that mere comments in his writings about ‘simple properties’ and ‘similar outputs’ for certain findings were themselves profound and subtle number theory results that remained unsuspected until nearly a century after his death.

  • Tags:

Goddess Kamala is 10th of the Dasha Maha Vidyas.

а§∞а§µа§њ-а§Єа§Ща•На§Ха•На§∞а§Ѓа§£-а§™а•Ба§£а•На§ѓа§Ха§Ња§≤а§Г
  • 06:41вЖТ09:42

16 ghatikas on either side of the transition of the Sun are sacred for various observances. In addition to specific puбєЗyakƒБlas like бє£aбЄНa≈ЫƒЂti, viбє£бєЗupadƒЂ etc., this is also useful, especially in cases where the other puбєЗyakƒБlas are inconvenient for appropriate performance of rituals such as snƒБna, dƒБna, tarpaбєЗa, etc.

а§Єа§Ња§ѓа§®-а§Єа§Ща•На§Ха•На§∞а§Ѓа§£-а§¶а§ња§®-а§™а•Ва§∞а•На§µа§Ња§єа•На§£-а§™а•Ба§£а•На§ѓа§Ха§Ња§≤а§Г
  • 06:41вЖТ12:18

When the transit of the Sun (saбєЕkrƒБnti) happens in the first half of the day (p≈ЂrvƒБhбєЗa) or after midnight of the previous day, the first half of the day is a puбєЗyakƒБla for various observances. In addition to 16 ghatikas on either side of the transition, and specific puбєЗyakƒБlas like бє£aбЄНa≈ЫƒЂti, viбє£бєЗupadƒЂ etc., this is also useful, especially in cases where the other puбєЗyakƒБlas are inconvenient for appropriate performance of rituals such as snƒБna, dƒБna, tarpaбєЗa, etc.

а§Єа§Ња§ѓа§®-а§µа•На§ѓа§§а•Аа§™а§Ња§§а§Г
  • 15:10вЖТ

When the sum of the longitudes of the Moon and Sun is 180, it is sƒБyana-vyatƒЂpƒБtaбЄ•, and a y≈НgaбЄ• that is to be excluded for auspicious activities.

  • а§Ха§Ња§Юа•На§Ъа•А а•Іа•™ а§Ьа§Ча§¶а•На§Ча•Ба§∞а•Б а§ґа•На§∞а•А-а§µа§ња§¶а•На§ѓа§Ња§Ша§®а•За§®а•На§¶а•На§∞ а§Єа§∞а§Єа•На§µа§§а•А а§Жа§∞а§Ња§Іа§®а§Њ #а•Іа•≠а•¶а•ђ, а§Ха§Ња§Юа•На§Ъа•А а•©а•™ а§Ьа§Ча§¶а•На§Ча•Ба§∞а•Б а§ґа•На§∞а•А-а§Ъа§®а•На§¶а•На§∞а§ґа•За§Ца§∞а•За§®а•На§¶а•На§∞ а§Єа§∞а§Єа•На§µа§§а•А а•® а§Жа§∞а§Ња§Іа§®а§Њ #а•Іа•©а•Іа•©, а§™а§Ња§∞а•На§µа§£а§µа•На§∞а§§а§Ѓа•Н а§Еа§Ѓа§Ња§µа§Ња§Єа•На§ѓа§Ња§ѓа§Ња§Ѓа•Н, а§™а§ња§£а•На§°-а§™а§ња§§а•Г-а§ѓа§Ьа•На§Юа§Г, а§ђа•Ла§Іа§Ња§ѓа§®-а§Ха§Ња§§а•На§ѓа§Ња§ѓа§®-а§За§Ја•На§Яа§ња§Г, а§Ѓа§Ња§∞а•На§Ча§ґа•Аа§∞а•На§Ј-а§Еа§Ѓа§Ња§µа§Ња§Єа•На§ѓа§Њ, а§ґа§Ѓа•На§≠а•Б-а§µа§ња§¶а•На§∞а•Ла§єа§Г #а•©а•™а•™, а§ґа•На§∞а§¶а•На§Іа§Ња§®а§®а•На§¶-а§єа§§а•На§ѓа§Њ #а•ѓа•ђ, а§ґа•На§∞а•А-а§єа§®а•Ва§Ѓа§§а•Н-а§Ьа§ѓа§®а•На§§а•А, а§Єа§Ња§ѓа§®-а§µа•На§ѓа§§а•Аа§™а§Ња§§а§Г
а§ђа•Ла§Іа§Ња§ѓа§®-а§Ха§Ња§§а•На§ѓа§Ња§ѓа§®-а§За§Ја•На§Яа§ња§Г

iбє£бє≠iбЄ• is performed on this day by those following the b≈НdhƒБyana/kƒБtyƒБyana s≈Ђtras. This difference happens because chandradar≈Ыanam occurs tomorrow, and followers of b≈НdhƒБyana/kƒБtyƒБyana s≈Ђtras do not perform iбє£бє≠iбЄ• on chandradar≈Ыanam day.

а§Ха§Ња§Юа•На§Ъа•А а•Іа•™ а§Ьа§Ча§¶а•На§Ча•Ба§∞а•Б а§ґа•На§∞а•А-а§µа§ња§¶а•На§ѓа§Ња§Ша§®а•За§®а•На§¶а•На§∞ а§Єа§∞а§Єа•На§µа§§а•А а§Жа§∞а§Ња§Іа§®а§Њ #а•Іа•≠а•¶а•ђ

Observed on AmƒБvƒБsyƒБ tithi of MƒБrga≈ЫƒЂrбє£aбЄ• (lunar) month (AparƒБhбєЗaбЄ•/vyaapti). The event occurred in 3418 (Kali era).

Having entered the peak named Agastya after established GaбєЕgƒБdharagƒЂбє£pati in the ƒБcƒБrya PƒЂбє≠ha and after subduing the Ugrabhairava through mantra, He stayed there itself. Son of ≈ЪrƒЂ Boppanna, known as ≈ЪrƒЂ NƒБyana earlier, that VidyƒБghana having got initiation from Saccidghana, endowed with enormous occult powers, having adorned the principal seat of KƒБmakoбє≠i for forty-five years, He merged (in Self) on the new moon day of the month of MƒБrga≈ЫƒЂrбє£a in the year DhƒБtu of ≈ЪƒБlivƒБhana era 239.

а§Ха§Ња§Юа•На§Ъа•А а•©а•™ а§Ьа§Ча§¶а•На§Ча•Ба§∞а•Б а§ґа•На§∞а•А-а§Ъа§®а•На§¶а•На§∞а§ґа•За§Ца§∞а•За§®а•На§¶а•На§∞ а§Єа§∞а§Єа•На§µа§§а•А а•® а§Жа§∞а§Ња§Іа§®а§Њ #а•Іа•©а•Іа•©

Observed on AmƒБvƒБsyƒБ tithi of MƒБrga≈ЫƒЂrбє£aбЄ• (lunar) month (AparƒБhбєЗaбЄ•/vyaapti). The event occurred in 3811 (Kali era).

The preceptor, son of MahƒБdeva, who lived on the banks of river Vegavati, known by Lord ≈ЪivaвАЩs name, who entered into the dense forest fire to save the child, wandered through out the earth by the directions of his master and adorning the PƒЂбє≠ha and made the four castes to adhere to their respective paths. The pleasing, elegant and enduring preceptor Sri Chandra≈Ыekarendra also having remained in his maбє≠ha for eighteen years disappeared on the new moon day of the month of MƒБrga≈ЫƒЂrбє£a in the year Saumya. His preceptorship was for eighteen years.

а§™а§ња§£а•На§°-а§™а§ња§§а•Г-а§ѓа§Ьа•На§Юа§Г

Pinda Pitru Yajnam is a ≈ЫrƒБddham to be done to two sets of Pitru Devatas. It is to be done in one’s Agnihotra Agni or if that is not present then Aupasana Agni. Rice is cooked in a section of the Agni moved to the south-east. From this, even those whose father is living, give ƒБhuti to the Deva Pitru-s ie s≈Нma, yama and agni kavyavƒБhana. Those whose father is not living should additionally give piбєЗбЄНas to the Manushya Pitru-s also to whom amƒБvƒБsyƒБ-≈ЫrƒБddham is also performed.

When the sum of the longitudes of the Moon and Sun is 180, it is sƒБyana-vyatƒЂpƒБtaбЄ•, and a y≈НgaбЄ• that is to be excluded for auspicious activities.

а§ґа§Ѓа•На§≠а•Б-а§µа§ња§¶а•На§∞а•Ла§єа§Г #а•©а•™а•™

Event occured on 1678-12-23 (gregorian). Julian date was converted to Gregorian in this reckoning.

sAmbhAji fled from parali and joined mogol general dilIr khan. He was greeted with a command position. sambhAjI would escape the next year, disgusted by dilIr khAn’s cruelty and conciliated by shivAjI.

Event occured on 1926-12-23 (gregorian).

Swami shraddhananda, who brought back lakhs of muslims to the deva-dharma, was shot to death by Abdul Rashid.

Details
  • Edit config file

а§єа•Ла§≤а•На§Ха§∞-а§∞а§Ња§Ьа§Ша§Яа•На§Я-а§Єа§®а•На§Іа§ња§Г #а•®а•Іа•Ѓ

Event occured on 1804-12-24 (gregorian).

Shortly after bAjI rAv 2’s surrender to the British, and the British victory over shiNDe forces; yashvantrAv holkar separately (re)started his fight but settled for a treaty with the British.

He was initially successful, but was chased and defeated by General Lake - more by diplomacy than battle. The jAT rAjA raNajIt singh briefly helped, but defected when pressed. daulatrAv shiNDe joined briefly but was soon bought off. Other such as raNajIt singh of panjAb, hill chiefs, even the afhAn shAh etc.. all backed off and stayed away.

He would write two years later to vyankojI bhosle: " I paid a visit to Daulatrao and explained to him how important it was for all of us to join to avert foreign domination. Daulatrao failed me. It was cooperation and good will which had built the Maratha state. But now, we have all become self seekers. You also did not make your promise good. It is no use now talking of past things. When I found myself abandoned on all sides, I accepted the offer the British agents brought to me and concluded the war.”

Details
  • Edit config file
  • Tags:
а§Ѓа•Ба§£а•На§°-а§™а•На§∞а•За§§а§Ьа§®а•На§Ѓа§¶а§ња§®-а§ѓа•Ба§¶а•На§Іа§Ѓа•Н #а•Іа•®а•©

Event occured on 1899-12-24 (gregorian).

On Christmas eve of 1899, acting on a carefully laid plan, Mundas, led by the anti-British and anti-Missionary apostate Birsa, attacked police stations and shot arrows into churches in many parts of the districts of Ranchi and Singhbhum. Savada Mission Hata, Muru Mission Hata, Borjo Mission hata were attacked.

Observed on ≈Ъukla-PrathamƒБ tithi of every (lunar) month (P≈ЂrvƒБhбєЗaбЄ•/puurvaviddha). sthƒБlƒЂpakaбЄ• is an important fortnightly ritual, involving the offering of haviбє£yƒБnna to agni, with the offering being cooked on the fire itself.

а§Йа§§а•На§Єа§µа§Ња§Г

  • а§ґа•Ба§Ха•На§≤-а§Ъа§§а•Ба§∞а•На§•а•А-а§µа•На§∞а§§а§Ѓа•Н, а§ґа•На§∞а§µа§£-а§µа•На§∞а§§а§Ѓа•Н, а§Єа•Ла§Ѓа§ґа•На§∞а§Ња§µа§£а•А-а§ѓа•Ла§Ча§Г
а§Єа•Ла§Ѓа§ґа•На§∞а§Ња§µа§£а•А-а§ѓа•Ла§Ча§Г
  • вЖТ16:39

When Shravana nakshatra falls on a Monday, it is a special y≈НgaбЄ•. When Rohini nakshatra falls on a Saturday, it is a special y≈НgaбЄ•. In the cyclic rotation of time, along with the bad combinations of grahas and nakshatras that indicate the probability of upcoming difficulties, good combinations that grant benefits in multiples also arise. Among such good combinations are the Amrita Siddhi yogas of certain weekdays and nakshatras. They are Sunday-Hasta, Monday-Mrigashirsha, Tuesday-Ashvini, Wednesday-Anuradha, Thursday-Pushya, Friday-Revati, Saturday-Rohini. Good deeds performed on such yogas become especially strong in protecting and nourishing us. For instance, in Devi Atharvashirsha, it is said bhaumƒБ≈ЫvinyƒБбєБ mahƒБdevƒЂ-sannidhau japtvƒБ mahƒБmrћ•tyuбєБ tarati, that is, one can cross even mahƒБmrћ•tyu by doing parayanam when Tuesday and Ashvini join.

а§Жа§¶а§ња§§а•На§ѓа§єа§Єа•На§§а•З а§Ча•Ба§∞а•Ба§™а•Ба§Ја•На§ѓа§ѓа•Ла§Ча•З а§ђа•Ба§Іа§Ња§®а•Ба§∞а§Ња§Іа§Њ а§ґа§®а§ња§∞а•Ла§єа§ња§£а•А а§Ъа•§
а§Єа•Ла§Ѓа•З а§Ъ а§Єа•Ма§Ѓа•На§ѓа§В а§≠а•Га§Ча•Ба§∞а•За§µа§§а•А а§Ъ а§≠а•Ма§Ѓа§Ња§ґа•На§µа§ња§®а•А а§Ъа§Ња§Ѓа•Га§§а§Єа§ња§¶а•На§Іа§ња§ѓа•Ла§Ча§Ња§Га••

а§Єа•Ба§Ѓа§®а•На§§а•Ба§∞а•Ба§µа§Ња§Ъ
а§Ја§Ја•На§†а•На§ѓа§Ња§В а§Ђа§≤а§Ња§ґа§®а•Л а§∞а§Ња§Ьа§®а•На§µа§ња§ґа•За§Ја§Ња§§а•Н а§Ха§Ња§∞а•На§§а§ња§Ха•З а§®а•Га§™ а••
а§∞а§Ња§Ьа•На§ѓа§Ъа•На§ѓа•Ба§§а•Л а§µа§ња§ґа•За§Ја•За§£ а§Єа•На§µа§В а§∞а§Ња§Ьа•На§ѓа§В а§≤а§≠а§§а•За§ља§Ъа§ња§∞а§Ња§§а•На••а•Іа••
а§Ја§Ја•На§†а•А а§§а§ња§•а§ња§∞а•На§Ѓа§єа§Ња§∞а§Ња§Ь а§Єа§∞а•На§µа§¶а§Њ а§Єа§∞а•На§µа§Ха§Ња§Ѓа§¶а§Ња••
а§Йа§™а•Ла§Ја•На§ѓа§Њ а§§а•Б а§™а•На§∞а§ѓа§§а•На§®а•За§® а§Єа§∞а•На§µа§Ха§Ња§≤а§В а§Ьа§ѓа§Ња§∞а•На§•а§ња§®а§Ња••а•®а••
а§Ха§Ња§∞а•На§§а•На§§а§ња§Ха•За§ѓа§Єа•На§ѓ а§¶а§ѓа§ња§§а§Њ а§Па§Ја§Њ а§Ја§Ја•На§†а•А а§Ѓа§єа§Ња§§а§ња§•а§ња§Га•§
а§¶а•За§µа§Єа•За§®а§Ња§Іа§ња§™а§§а•На§ѓа§В а§єа§њ а§™а•На§∞а§Ња§™а•На§§а§В а§§а§Єа•На§ѓа§Ња§В а§Ѓа§єа§Ња§§а•На§Ѓа§®а§Ња••а•©а••
а§Еа§Єа•На§ѓа§Ња§В а§єа§њ а§ґа•На§∞а•За§ѓа§Єа§Њ а§ѓа•Ба§Ха•На§§а•Л а§ѓа§Єа•На§Ѓа§Ња§§а•На§Єа•На§Ха§®а•На§¶а•Л а§≠а§µа§Ња§Ча•На§∞а§£а•Аа§Га•§
а§§а§Єа•На§Ѓа§Ња§§а•На§Ја§Ја•На§†а•На§ѓа§Ња§В а§®а§Ха•На§§а§≠а•Ла§Ьа•А а§™а•На§∞а§Ња§™а•На§®а•Ба§ѓа§Ња§¶а•Аа§™а•На§Єа§ња§§а§В а§Єа§¶а§Ња••а•™а••
а§¶а§§а•На§§а•На§µа§Ња§ља§∞а•На§Ша•На§ѓа§В а§Ха§Ња§∞а•На§§а§ња§Ха•За§ѓа§Ња§ѓ а§Єа•На§•а§ња§§а•На§µа§Њ а§µа•И а§¶а§Ха•На§Ја§ња§£а§Ња§Ѓа•Ба§Ца§Га•§
а§¶а§Іа•На§®а§Њ а§Ша•Га§§а•Ла§¶а§Ха•Иа§Г а§™а•Ба§Ја•На§™а•Иа§∞а•На§Ѓа§®а•На§§а•На§∞а•За§£а§Ња§®а•За§® а§Єа•Ба§µа•На§∞а§§а••а•Ђа••
а§Єа§™а•На§§а§∞а•На§Ја§ња§¶а§Ња§∞а§Ь а§Єа•На§Ха§®а•На§¶ а§Єа•На§µа§Ња§єа§Ња§™а§§а§ња§Єа§Ѓа•Ба§¶а•На§≠а§µа•§
а§∞а•Ба§¶а•На§∞а§Ња§∞а•На§ѓа§Ѓа§Ња§Ча•На§®а§ња§Ь а§µа§ња§≠а•Л а§Ча§Ща•На§Ча§Ња§Ча§∞а•На§≠ а§®а§Ѓа•Ла§ља§Єа•На§§а•Б а§§а•За•§
а§™а•На§∞а•Аа§ѓа§§а§Ња§В а§¶а•За§µа§Єа•За§®а§Ња§®а•Аа§Г а§Єа§Ѓа•На§™а§Ња§¶а§ѓа§§а•Б а§єа•Га§¶а•На§Ча§§а§Ѓа•На••а•ђа••
а§¶а§§а•На§§а•На§µа§Њ а§µа§ња§™а•На§∞а§Ња§ѓ а§Ъа§Ња§ља§ља§§а•На§Ѓа§Ња§®а•На§®а§В а§ѓа§Ъа•На§Ъа§Ња§®а•На§ѓа§¶а§™а§њ а§µа§ња§¶а•На§ѓа§§а•За•§
а§™а§ґа•На§Ъа§Ња§¶а•На§≠а•Ба§Ща•На§Ха•На§§а•З а§§а•На§µа§Єа•М а§∞а§Ња§§а•На§∞а•М а§≠а•Ва§Ѓа§ња§В а§Ха•Га§§а•На§µа§Њ а§§а•Б а§≠а§Ња§Ьа§®а§Ѓа•На••а•≠а••

а••а§За§§а§њ а§ґа•На§∞а•Аа§≠а§µа§ња§Ја•На§ѓа•З а§Ѓа§єа§Ња§™а•Ба§∞а§Ња§£а•З а§ґа§§а§Ња§∞а•На§Іа§Єа§Ња§єа§Єа•На§∞а•На§ѓа§Ња§В а§Єа§Ва§єа§ња§§а§Ња§ѓа§Ња§В а§ђа•На§∞а§Ња§єа•На§Ѓа•За§™а§∞а•На§µа§£а§њ а§™а§Юа•На§Ъа§Ѓа•Аа§Ха§≤а•На§™а•З а§Ја§Ја•На§†а•Аа§Ха§≤а•На§™а§µа§∞а•На§£а§®а§В а§®а§Ња§Ѓ а§Па§Ха•Ла§®а§Ъа§§а•На§µа§Ња§∞а§ња§Ва§ґа•Ла§ља§Іа•На§ѓа§Ња§ѓа§Га••

а§Ъа§ња§Ѓа§Ња§Ьа•А-а§¶а•За§є-а§§а•На§ѓа§Ња§Ча§Г #а•®а•Ѓа•®

Event occured on 1740-12-28 (gregorian). Julian date was converted to Gregorian in this reckoning.

Chimaji Appa passed away at Pune on 17 Dec 1740, leaving a young Nanasaheb Peshwa to face the challenges of the extraordinary epoch that was to follow. Chimaji’s decisive victories in Malwa, Vasai and against the Siddi deserve to be remembered.

Details
  • Edit config file
  • Tags:
а§Ѓа§єа§Ња§Іа§®а•Ба§∞а•На§µа•На§ѓа§§а•Аа§™а§Ња§§-а§ґа•На§∞а§Ња§¶а•На§Іа§Ѓа•Н

vyatƒЂpƒБta is regarded as the king of y≈Нgas. Though it occurs 13 times every year, the occurrence in dhanurmƒБsa is special, and this day is special for a number of special observances, such as ≈Ыivap≈ЂjƒБ, pitrћ•tarpaбєЗam etc. One must also give arghyam with the shloka mentioned here, and perform the usual (dhanurmƒБsa) naivedyam of mudgƒБnnam. Markandeya Rishi has performed upadesham of a year-long vratam, beginning this day, including the p≈Ђja of vyatƒЂpata-dƒУvatƒБ. Puranas also narrate the story of rich merchant names Vishwasakha, who was born as a wild boar owing to denying food to a hungry vipra on Vyatipata day. Having lost half his body to a forest fire, the boar was redeemed from this plight by the Raja Haryashva, who passed by, and gave away his accrued merits from vyatƒЂpƒБta-snƒБna-dƒБnam. As a result of this, the wild boar attained a divine form.

а§Йа§§а•На§Єа§µа§Ња§Г

  • а§Ха§Ъ-а§µа§ња§єа§Ња§∞-а§Ѓа§®а•На§¶а§ња§∞-а§®а§Ња§ґа§Г #а•©а•ђа•І, а§®а•Жа§°а•Ба§Ва§Ха•Ла§Я-а§ѓа•Ба§¶а•На§Іа§Ѓа•Н #а•®а•©а•©, а§Ѓа§єа§Ња§Іа§®а•Ба§∞а•На§µа•На§ѓа§§а•Аа§™а§Ња§§-а§Єа•На§®а§Ња§®а§Ѓа•Н, а§Єа§ња§®а•На§Іа•Н-а§Ца•За§°а•Н-а§ѓа•Ба§¶а•На§Іа§Ѓа•Н #а•®а•ђа•Ђ
а§Ха§Ъ-а§µа§ња§єа§Ња§∞-а§Ѓа§®а•На§¶а§ња§∞-а§®а§Ња§ґа§Г #а•©а•ђа•І

Event occured on 1661-12-29 (gregorian). Julian date was converted to Gregorian in this reckoning.

On Dec 19, 1661, Mir Jumla (general of Awrangzeb) entered the city of Cooch-Bihar, which had been evacuated by its king and people, and appointed Sayyid Mohammed, Sadiq to be chief judge, with directions to destroy all the Hindu temples and to erect mosques in their stead. Mir Jumla himself with a battle-axe broke the image of Narayan.

Details
  • Edit config file
  • Tags:
а§Ѓа§єа§Ња§Іа§®а•Ба§∞а•На§µа•На§ѓа§§а•Аа§™а§Ња§§-а§Єа•На§®а§Ња§®а§Ѓа•Н

Observed on VyatƒЂpƒБtaбЄ• yoga of DhanuбЄ• (sidereal solar) month (PrƒБktanƒБruбєЗ≈НdayaбЄ•/puurvaviddha).

Special snƒБnam on account of mahƒБdhanurvyatƒЂpƒБtam. snƒБnam on any vyatƒЂpata day gives mahƒБpuбєЗyam, more so in dhanurmƒБsa.

а§™а•Ба§Ја•На§ѓа•З а§Ъ а§Ьа§®а•На§Ѓа§®а§Ха•На§Ја§§а•На§∞а•З а§µа•На§ѓа§§а•Аа§™а§Ња§§а•З а§Ъ а§µа•Иа§Іа•Га§§а•Ма•§
а§Еа§Ѓа§Ња§ѓа§Ња§В а§Ъ а§®а§¶а•Аа§Єа•На§®а§Ња§®а§В а§™а•Ба§®а§Ња§§а•На§ѓа§Ња§Єа§™а•На§§а§Ѓа§В а§Ха•Ба§≤а§Ѓа•На••
а§µа•На§ѓа§§а•Аа§™а§Ња§§ а§Ѓа§єа§Ња§ђа§Ња§єа•Л а§Єа§∞а•На§µа§™а§Ња§™а§™а•На§∞а§£а§Ња§ґа§®а•§
а§Єа§єа§Єа•На§∞а§ђа§Ња§єа•Л а§µа§ња§ґа•На§µа§Ња§§а•На§Ѓа§®а•Н а§Ча•Га§єа§Ња§£а§Ња§∞а•На§Ша•На§ѓа§В а§®а§Ѓа•Ла§ља§Єа•На§§а•Б а§§а•За••

  • Tags: SpecialSnanam
а§®а•Жа§°а•Ба§Ва§Ха•Ла§Я-а§ѓа•Ба§¶а•На§Іа§Ѓа•Н #а•®а•©а•©

Event occured on 1789-12-29 (gregorian).

On this day, in the first battle on the neDuMkoTa coast-to-mountain fortification, Tipu Sultan and troops were routed. Tipu was wounded (physically and mentally), and lost 1k troops. padmanAbhapura lost 300. Several of Tipu’s officers (including Europeans) were captured.

Two horses were shot from under Tipu, and he even got an arrow in the back. During the hasty retreat, Tipu fell back into the ditch twice before being helped out and the occasional lameness which he suffered until his death was reputedly the consequence. Tipu’s sword, the palanquin, the dagger, the ring and many other personal effects fell into the ditch, and then into the hands of the minister keshava-dAsa.

Aftermath

Humiliated Tipu vowed to take down “the contemptible wall”. The fine wall held up till 15th April. Then he managed a 1km wide breach after 1 month of sustained artillery fire and poured in - only to be foiled again at Alwaye river bank. He retreated by 24 May 1790 to defend his kingdom from British threat.

Context

The Dutch captive-turned general of padmanAbhapura’s mArtANDa varma, De Lannoy, had built an excellent fortification from coast to mountain - neDuMkoTa. It had a 16 feet wide and 20 deep ditch. dharmarAja rAma varma had tried to get British help when Tipu’s attack was imminent, but only got words. The Dutch, who’d sold forts to rAma varma helped a bit - by sending an engineer von Krause, who was dispatched to the wall. He wrote an account of the battle.

When Tipu attacked, he tried filling a small portion of the ditch with cotton sacks and moving in a small column via a narrow passage. At first the Mysoreans overpowered three batteries of the Lines but subsequently their flanks were subjected to fire from the woods. They were so surprised by the first round of fire that they fell into disorder. Then the well drilled nair army advanced and the confusion increased. Those Mysoreans who had not yet been trampled down by their horses while retreating found that the sacks with cotton, used for filling up the ditch when they set out, as well as some powder-barrels, had caught fire. This forced them to jump from the ramparts.

Details
  • Edit config file
  • Tags:
а§Єа§ња§®а•На§Іа•Н-а§Ца•За§°а•Н-а§ѓа•Ба§¶а•На§Іа§Ѓа•Н #а•®а•ђа•Ђ

Event occured on 1757-12-29 (gregorian).

On this day (Margashirsha Chaturthi), vishvAs rAv, the teenage son of peshvA nAnAsAheb bAlAjI rAv, assisted ably by dattAjI shiNDe, defeated nizAm’s forces in the battle of Sindkhed and forced him to cede territory with a revenue of 25 lakhs, including the naldurg fort. “Negotiations continued for 2 weeks…. This was Vishwasrao’s first battle. He did well, may he gain more victories.” says a Maratha letter.

Events

Ibrahim Khan Gardi was still under Nizam’s employ. There was a big artillery attack by the marAThas, followed by an infantry square advance by Nizam’s side and cavalry attacks by Marathas. “They had taken about 300-500 men and 200 horses dead. Our losses were fewer. Their infantry retired from the field, we held our positions. An envoy from the Nizam arrived in our camp.” says a marATha letter.

а§Йа§§а•На§Єа§µа§Ња§Г

  • а§≠а•Га§Ча•Ба§∞а•За§µа§§а•А-а§ѓа•Ла§Ча§Г
а§≠а•Га§Ча•Ба§∞а•За§µа§§а•А-а§ѓа•Ла§Ча§Г
  • 11:22вЖТ

When Revati nakshatra falls on a Friday, it is a special y≈НgaбЄ•. When Rohini nakshatra falls on a Saturday, it is a special y≈НgaбЄ•. In the cyclic rotation of time, along with the bad combinations of grahas and nakshatras that indicate the probability of upcoming difficulties, good combinations that grant benefits in multiples also arise. Among such good combinations are the Amrita Siddhi yogas of certain weekdays and nakshatras. They are Sunday-Hasta, Monday-Mrigashirsha, Tuesday-Ashvini, Wednesday-Anuradha, Thursday-Pushya, Friday-Revati, Saturday-Rohini. Good deeds performed on such yogas become especially strong in protecting and nourishing us. For instance, in Devi Atharvashirsha, it is said bhaumƒБ≈ЫvinyƒБбєБ mahƒБdevƒЂ-sannidhau japtvƒБ mahƒБmrћ•tyuбєБ tarati, that is, one can cross even mahƒБmrћ•tyu by doing parayanam when Tuesday and Ashvini join.

а§Єа•Ла§Ѓа•З а§Ъ а§Єа•Ма§Ѓа•На§ѓа§В а§≠а•Га§Ча•Ба§∞а•За§µа§§а•А а§Ъ а§≠а•Ма§Ѓа§Ња§ґа•На§µа§ња§®а•А а§Ъа§Ња§Ѓа•Га§§а§Єа§ња§¶а•На§Іа§ња§ѓа•Ла§Ча§Ња§Га••

а§Йа§§а•На§Єа§µа§Ња§Г

а§µа§Ња§ѓа§ња§≤а§Ња§∞а•Н а§®а§Ња§ѓа§©а§Ња§∞а•Н (а•™а•ѓ) а§Ча•Ба§∞а•Ба§™а•Ва§Ьа•И

Observed on RƒУvatƒЂ nakshatra of DhanuбЄ• (sidereal solar) month (PrƒБtaбЄ•/paraviddha).

Details
  • Edit config file
  • Tags: NayanarGurupujai
а§µа§Єа§Ња§ѓа•Н-а§Єа§®а•На§Іа§ња§Г #а•®а•®а•¶

Event occured on 1802-12-31 (gregorian).

In a selfish and short-sighted move, bAjI-rAv 2 signed the Treaty of Bassein and became a subordinate ally of the British after running away from yashvantrAv holkar’s vectorious army. Earlier he had taken shiNDe’s side in the shiNDe-holkar rivalry and had executed yashvantrAv’s brother by elephant trampling. Soon, with successful execution of the “divide and conquer” strategy, the East India Company forces won against the shiNDe army in isolation; and then the holkar army.
